   373→    'minimax': {'endpoint': 'https://api.minimax.chat/v1/text/chatcompletion_v2', 'model': 'abab6.5s-chat'},
   374→    'stepfun': {'endpoint': 'https://api.stepfun.com/v1/chat/completions', 'model': 'step-1-8k'},
   375→    'doubao': {'endpoint': 'https://ark.cn-beijing.volces.com/api/v3/chat/completions', 'model': 'doubao-pro-4k'},
   376→    'openai': {'endpoint': 'https://api.openai.com/v1/chat/completions', 'model': 'gpt-4o-mini'},
   377→    'claude': {'endpoint': 'https://api.anthropic.com/v1/messages', 'model': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514'},
   378→    'gemini': {'endpoint': 'https://generativelanguage.googleapis.com/v1beta/chat/completions', 'model': 'gemini-2.0-flash'},
   379→    'groq_llm': {'endpoint': 'https://api.groq.com/openai/v1/chat/completions', 'model': 'llama-3.1-70b-versatile'},
   380→    'mistral': {'endpoint': 'https://api.mistral.ai/v1/chat/completions', 'model': 'mistral-large-latest'},
   381→    'cohere': {'endpoint': 'https://api.cohere.com/v2/chat', 'model': 'command-r-plus'},
   382→    'perplexity': {'endpoint': 'https://api.perplexity.ai/chat/completions', 'model': 'sonar-pro'},
   383→    'together': {'endpoint': 'https://api.together.xyz/v1/chat/completions', 'model': 'meta-llama/Llama-3-70b-chat-hf'},
   384→}
   385→
   386→LLM_MODELS = {
   387→    'zhipu': 'glm-4-flash',
   388→    'deepseek': 'deepseek-chat',
   389→    'qwen': 'qwen-turbo',
   390→    'moonshot': 'moonshot-v1-8k',
   391→    'baichuan': 'Baichuan4',
   392→    'minimax': 'abab6.5s-chat',
   393→    'stepfun': 'step-1-8k',
   394→    'doubao': 'doubao-pro-4k',
   395→    'openai': 'gpt-4o-mini',
   396→    'claude': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
   397→    'gemini': 'gemini-2.0-flash',
   398→    'groq_llm': 'llama-3.1-70b-versatile',
   399→    'mistral': 'mistral-large-latest',
   400→    'cohere': 'command-r-plus',
   401→    'perplexity': 'sonar-pro',
   402→    'together': 'meta-llama/Llama-3-70b-chat-hf',
   403→}
   404→
   405→def test_llm(provider, api_key=''):
   406→    """测试大模型API连通性"""
   407→    if not api_key:
   408→        return '请先输入API Key'
   409→
   410→    ep_info = LLM_ENDPOINTS.get(provider)
   411→    model = LLM_MODELS.get(provider, 'model')
   412→
   413→    if not ep_info:
   414→        return '未知服务商'
   415→    endpoint = ep_info['endpoint']
   416→
   417→    try:
   418→        if provider == 'claude':
   419→            headers = {
   420→                'x-api-key': api_key,
   421→                'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
   422→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   423→            }
   424→            data = {
   425→                'model': model,
   426→                'max_tokens': 10,
   427→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   428→            }
   429→        elif provider == 'zhipu':
   430→            # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token格式
   431→            headers = {
   432→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   433→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   434→            }
   435→            data = {
   436→                'model': model,
   437→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   438→                'max_tokens': 10,
   439→                'stream': False,
   440→            }
   441→        else:
   442→            headers = {
   443→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   444→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   445→            }
   446→            data = {
   447→                'model': model,
   448→                'max_tokens': 10,
   449→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   450→            }
   451→
   452→        resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
   453→
   454→        if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
   455→            return '%s: 连接成功' % provider
   456→        else:
   457→            # 尝试解析错误信息
   458→            try:
   459→                err_data = resp.json()
   460→                err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
   461→            except:
   462→                err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else 'HTTP %d' % resp.status_code
   463→            return '%s: HTTP %d - %s' % (provider, resp.status_code, err_msg)
   464→
   465→    except Exception as e:
   466→        return '测试失败: %s' % str(e)[:80]
   467→
   468→
   469→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
   470→def run_compare(audio_text, doc_path):
   471→    """主入口：接收ASR文本，进行文本对比"""
   472→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
   473→    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   474→    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
   475→    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
   476→
   477→
   478→def run_compare_with_timestamps(audio_text, doc_text, audio_timestamps=None):
   479→    """带时间戳的对比：返回结构化差异列表（Java侧调用）
   480→
   481→    Args:
   482→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   483→        doc_text: 原始文档文本
   484→        audio_timestamps: 词级时间戳列表 [{'word': '字', 'start': 秒, 'end': 秒}, ...]
   485→
   486→    Returns:
   487→        {
   488→            'summary': '统计摘要',
   489→            'diffs': [
   490→                {'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': '原文', 'audioText': '录音', 'time_start': 12.3, 'time_end': 15.6},
   491→                ...
   492→            ]
   493→        }
   494→    """
   495→    from difflib import SequenceMatcher
   496→
   497→    paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   498→    doc_text_full = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   499→
   500→    # 分词
   501→    audio_words = [c for c in audio_text if c.strip()]
   502→    doc_words = [c for c in doc_text_full if c.strip()]
   503→
   504→    # 构建时间戳映射（字符级 -> 时间）
   505→    ts_map = {}
   506→    if audio_timestamps:
   507→        offset = 0
   508→        for ts in audio_timestamps:
   509→            word = ts.get('word', '')
   510→            start = ts.get('start', 0)
   511→            end = ts.get('end', start)
   512→            for i, ch in enumerate(word):
   513→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': start, 'end': end}
   514→            offset += len(word)
   515→
   516→    # 音频字符偏移
   517→    audio_offsets = []
   518→    off = 0
   519→    for w in audio_words:
   520→        audio_offsets.append(off)
   521→        off += len(w)
   522→
   523→    # 序列比对
   524→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   525→    diffs = []
   526→
   527→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   528→        if tag == 'equal':
   529→            continue
   530→
   531→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   532→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   533→
   534→        # 过滤填充词
   535→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   536→            continue
   537→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   538→            continue
   539→        if tag == 'replace':
   540→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   541→                continue
   542→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   543→                continue
   544→
   545→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
   546→            continue
   547→
   548→        # 获取时间戳
   549→        time_start = time_end = None
   550→        if j1 < len(audio_offsets) and ts_map:
   551→            char_off = audio_offsets[j1]
   552→            if char_off in ts_map:
   553→                time_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   554→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_offsets):
   555→                end_off = audio_offsets[j2 - 1]
   556→                if end_off in ts_map:
   557→                    time_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   558→
   559→        diff_entry = {
   560→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra'),
   561→            'docText': doc_frag,
   562→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   563→        }
   564→        if time_start is not None:
   565→            diff_entry['time_start'] = time_start
   566→        if time_end is not None:
   567→            diff_entry['time_end'] = time_end
   568→        diffs.append(diff_entry)
   569→
   570→    # 统计
   571→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   572→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'missing')
   573→    n_ext = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'extra')
   574→
   575→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_ext)
   576→
   577→    return {'summary': summary, 'diffs': diffs}
   578→
   579→
   580→def generate_report_txt(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs_json=''):
   581→    """生成对比报告（优先Word，失败降级txt）
   582→
   583→    Args:
   584→        audio_path: 录音文件路径
   585→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
   586→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   587→        result_text: 对比结果文本（用于txt降级）
   588→        diffs_json: JSON格式的结构化差异列表（含时间戳）
   589→    """
   590→    from datetime import datetime
   591→    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   592→
   593→    # 确定保存目录
   594→    try:
   595→        from java import jclass
   596→        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getApplication()
   597→        reports_dir = os.path.join(context.getFilesDir().getAbsolutePath(), 'reports')
   598→    except:
   599→        reports_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'reports')
   600→
   601→    os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   602→
   603→    # 解析结构化差异数据
   604→    diffs = []
   605→    if diffs_json:
   606→        try:
   607→            diffs = json.loads(diffs_json)
   608→        except:
   609→            pass
   610→    if not diffs:
   611→        diffs = _parse_result_text(result_text)
   612→
   613→    # 优先尝试生成Word文档
   614→    try:
   615→        report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.docx' % timestamp)
   616→        _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs)
   617→        return report_path
   618→    except Exception as e:
   619→        print('Word生成失败，降级为txt: %s' % e)
   620→        import traceback
   621→        traceback.print_exc()
   622→
   623→    # 降级：生成txt
   624→    report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.txt' % timestamp)
   625→    with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   626→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
   627→        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
   628→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')
   629→        f.write('生成时间: %s\n' % datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   630→        f.write('录音文件: %s\n' % os.path.basename(audio_path))
   631→        f.write('文档文件: %s\n\n' % os.path.basename(doc_path))
   632→        f.write(result_text)
   633→        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   634→        f.write('完整转写文本:\n')
   635→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   636→        f.write(audio_text)
   637→    return report_path
   638→
   639→
   640→def _parse_result_text(result_text):
   641→    """从对比结果文本中解析差异列表"""
   642→    diffs = []
   643→    for line in result_text.split('\n'):
   644→        line = line.strip()
   645→        if not line:
   646→            continue
   647→        if line.startswith('[误读]'):
   648→            parts = line[4:].strip()
   649→            if '→' in parts:
   650→                left, right = parts.split('→', 1)
   651→                doc_t = left.replace('原文:', '').strip()
   652→                audio_t = right.replace('录音:', '').strip()
   653→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': doc_t, 'audioText': audio_t})
   654→            else:
   655→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': parts, 'audioText': ''})
   656→        elif line.startswith('[漏读]'):
   657→            diffs.append({'type': 'missing', 'docText': line[4:].strip(), 'audioText': ''})
   658→        elif line.startswith('[多读]'):
   659→            diffs.append({'type': 'extra', 'docText': '', 'audioText': line[4:].strip()})
   660→    return diffs
   661→
   662→
   663→def _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs):
   664→    """生成Word格式对比报告，差异标红+时间戳蓝"""
   665→    from docx import Document
   666→    from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt
   667→    from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
   668→    from datetime import datetime
   669→
   670→    doc = Document()
   671→
   672→    # 标题
   673→    title = doc.add_heading('配音文字核对报告', level=1)
   674→    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   675→
   676→    # 基本信息
   677→    doc.add_paragraph('')
   678→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   679→    info.add_run('生成时间: ').bold = True
   680→    info.add_run(datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   681→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   682→    info.add_run('录音文件: ').bold = True
   683→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(audio_path))
   684→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   685→    info.add_run('文档文件: ').bold = True
   686→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(doc_path))
   687→
   688→    # 统计摘要
   689→    lines = result_text.strip().split('\n')
   690→    if lines:
   691→        doc.add_paragraph('')
   692→        summary_para = doc.add_paragraph()
   693→        summary_run = summary_para.add_run(lines[0])
   694→        summary_run.bold = True
   695→        summary_run.font.size = Pt(14)
   696→        if len(lines) > 1:
   697→            acc_run = summary_para.add_run('\n' + lines[1])
   698→            acc_run.font.size = Pt(12)
   699→
   700→    # 差异详情
   701→    doc.add_heading('差异详情（红色=误读，蓝色=漏读，绿色=多读，蓝色=时间戳）', level=2)
   702→
   703→    if not diffs:
   704→        doc.add_paragraph('无差异，完全一致。')
   705→    else:
   706→        for i, d in enumerate(diffs, 1):
   707→            p = doc.add_paragraph()
   708→            dtype = d.get('type', '')
   709→
   710→            # 时间戳（蓝色标注）
   711→            time_str = ''
   712→            if 'time_start' in d:
   713→                ts = d['time_start']
   714→                m = int(ts // 60)
   715→                s = ts % 60
   716→                time_str = f'{m:02d}:{s:05.2f}'
   717→                ts_run = p.add_run(' [@%s]' % time_str)
   718→                ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 100, 255)
   719→                ts_run.font.italic = True
   720→
   721→            if dtype == 'mismatch':
   722→                # 误读 - 红色标注
   723→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [误读] ' % i)
   724→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   725→                tag.bold = True
   726→
   727→                r1 = p.add_run(' 原文: %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   728→                r1.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   729→
   730→                p.add_run('  →  ')
   731→
   732→                r2 = p.add_run('录音: %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   733→                r2.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   734→                r2.underline = True
   735→
   736→            elif dtype == 'missing':
   737→                # 漏读 - 蓝色标注
   738→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [漏读] ' % i)
   739→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   740→                tag.bold = True
   741→
   742→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   743→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   744→
   745→            elif dtype == 'extra':
   746→                # 多读 - 绿色标注
   747→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [多读] ' % i)
   748→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   749→                tag.bold = True
   750→
   751→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   752→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   753→
   754→    # 完整转写文本
   755→    doc.add_page_break()
   756→    doc.add_heading('完整转写文本', level=2)
   757→    doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
   758→
   759→    doc.save(report_path)
   760→

content.content:
1→"""核心对比算法 - 移植自桌面版 compare.py，适配Android"""
     2→import re
     3→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→
     6→# 填充词过滤
     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个'}
     9→
    10→CN_NUMBERS_READING = {
    11→    '0': '零', '1': '一', '2': '二', '3': '三', '4': '四',
    12→    '5': '五', '6': '六', '7': '七', '8': '八', '9': '九'
    13→}
    14→
    15→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]')
    16→
    17→
    18→def _normalize(text):
    19→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    20→
    21→
    22→def _is_punct(ch):
    23→    return bool(_RE_PUNCT.match(ch))
    24→
    25→
    26→def _segment(text):
    27→    """分词：优先用jieba，不可用时按字切分"""
    28→    try:
    29→        import jieba
    30→        return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # Android上jieba可能不可用，按字切分
    33→        return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    34→
    35→
    36→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    37→    """拼音比较：字数相同且每个字读音（含声调）一致则视为合格
    38→    支持中文同音字、数字读音、英语大小写等场景
    39→    """
    40→    if not a or not b:
    41→        return False
    42→    a_clean = _normalize(a)
    43→    b_clean = _normalize(b)
    44→    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
    45→        return False
    46→    if a_clean == b_clean:
    47→        return True
    48→    # 英语大小写不敏感
    49→    if a_clean.lower() == b_clean.lower():
    50→        return True
    51→    # 数字规范化后比较
    52→    a_num = _normalize_number_reading(a_clean)
    53→    b_num = _normalize_number_reading(b_clean)
    54→    if a_num == b_num:
    55→        return True
    56→    # 字数不同直接返回False
    57→    if len(a_clean) != len(b_clean):
    58→        # 但数字展开后字数可能不同，用拼音再试
    59→        pass
    60→    try:
    61→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    62→        # 用TONE3风格：带声调数字 (如 zhong1, guo2)
    63→        # 先用原始文本比较
    64→        pa = pinyin(a_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    65→        pb = pinyin(b_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    66→        if pa == pb:
    67→            return True
    68→        # 数字规范化后再用拼音比较
    69→        pa_num = pinyin(a_num, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    70→        pb_num = pinyin(b_num, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    71→        if pa_num == pb_num:
    72→            return True
    73→    except ImportError:
    74→        pass
    75→    return False
    76→
    77→
    78→def _arabic_to_chinese(num_str, is_year=False):
    79→    if not num_str or not num_str.isdigit():
    80→        return num_str
    81→    if is_year:
    82→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    83→    try:
    84→        num = int(num_str)
    85→        if num < 10:
    86→            return CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str]
    87→        elif num < 20:
    88→            return '十' + (CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str[1]] if num_str[1] != '0' else '')
    89→        elif num < 100:
    90→            t, o = num // 10, num % 10
    91→            r = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(t)] + '十'
    92→            if o > 0:
    93→                r += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(o)]
    94→            return r
    95→        else:
    96→            return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    97→    except:
    98→        return num_str
    99→
   100→
   101→def _normalize_number_reading(text):
   102→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in m.group(1)) + '年', text)
   103→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
   104→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
   105→    return re.sub(r'\s+', '', result)
   106→
   107→
   108→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, word_pos, doc_words):
   109→    char_offset = sum(len(w) for w in doc_words[:word_pos])
   110→    running = 0
   111→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
   112→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
   113→        if running + plen > char_offset:
   114→            return idx
   115→        running += plen
   116→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
   117→
   118→
   119→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=None, confidence_threshold=0.0):
   120→    """核心对比算法：jieba分词 + SequenceMatcher + 拼音同音字识别"""
   121→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   122→
   123→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
   124→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
   125→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
   126→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
   127→
   128→    # 时间戳映射
   129→    ts_map = {}
   130→    if word_timestamps:
   131→        offset = 0
   132→        for wt in word_timestamps:
   133→            w_norm = _normalize(wt['word'])
   134→            for i in range(len(w_norm)):
   135→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
   136→            offset += len(w_norm)
   137→
   138→    # 序列比对
   139→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   140→    raw_diffs = []
   141→
   142→    audio_char_offsets = []
   143→    off = 0
   144→    for w in audio_words:
   145→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
   146→        off += len(w)
   147→
   148→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   149→        if tag == 'equal':
   150→            continue
   151→
   152→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   153→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   154→
   155→        # 过滤填充词
   156→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   157→            continue
   158→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   159→            continue
   160→        if tag == 'replace':
   161→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   162→                continue
   163→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   164→                continue
   165→
   166→        # 跳过纯标点差异
   167→        if all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in doc_frag) and all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in audio_frag):
   168→            continue
   169→
   170→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, i1, doc_words)
   171→
   172→        # 获取时间戳
   173→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   174→        confidence = 1.0
   175→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   176→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   177→            if char_off in ts_map:
   178→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   179→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   180→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   181→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   182→                if end_off in ts_map:
   183→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   184→
   185→        diff_entry = {
   186→            'docText': doc_frag,
   187→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   188→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   189→            'position': pos,
   190→            'confidence': confidence,
   191→        }
   192→        if ts_start is not None:
   193→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   194→        if ts_end is not None:
   195→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   196→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   197→
   198→    # 统计
   199→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   200→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   201→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   202→
   203→    # 字准确率
   204→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
   205→    diff_chars = sum(max(len(d['docText']), len(d['audioText'])) for d in raw_diffs)
   206→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - diff_chars / total) * 100)
   207→
   208→    summary = f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n字准确率 {accuracy:.1f}%'
   209→
   210→    return {
   211→        'diffs': raw_diffs,
   212→        'summary': summary,
   213→        'accuracy': accuracy,
   214→        'n_mismatch': n_mismatch,
   215→        'n_missing': n_missing,
   216→        'n_extra': n_extra,
   217→    }
   218→

Now I have a comprehensive understanding of the project. Let me provide a detailed summary:

---

## 项目结构分析报告：配音文字核对宝

### 1. 项目整体架构

这是一个 **Android APK 应用**，使用 **Kivy + Chaquo Python** 框架构建，实现了录音文件与文档的智能对比功能。项目采用混合架构：

```
d:\voicedoccompare\app\
├── main.py                 # Kivy主程序入口
├── build.gradle            # Android构建配置
├── core/                   # Python核心业务逻辑模块
├── ui/                     # Python UI模块（目前空）
├── src/                    # Android原生代码
├── models/                 # Sherpa-ONNX离线语音识别模型
├── libs/                   # Sherpa-ONNX Android库
└── build/                  # 构建输出目录
```

### 2. 关键文件及其作用

#### Python核心文件

| 文件路径 | 作用 |
|---------|------|
| `main.py` | **Kivy应用主程序** - 包含完整的UI定义、文件选择、对比流程、配置管理、微信导入等核心功能 |
| `core/compare.py` | **文本对比算法** - 使用jieba分词+SequenceMatcher实现中文同音字识别、数字规范化、填充词过滤 |
| `core/transcribe.py` | **语音转录引擎** - 集成Sherpa-ONNX离线识别、百度/Groq/OpenAI Whisper云端API、FunASR局域网服务 |
| `core/report_gen.py` | **Word报告生成** - 使用python-docx生成带差异标注的Word文档 |
| `core/docx_util.py` | **文档解析** - 解析Word文档和纯文本文件 |
| `core/config.py` | **服务商配置** - ASR/LLM服务商定义和映射表 |
| `core/wechat_import.py` | **微信文件导入** - 处理Android Share Intent接收微信分享的文件 |
| `core/model_download.py` | **离线模型下载** - Sherpa-ONNX Paraformer模型下载和进度回调 |

#### Android原生代码

| 文件路径 | 作用 |
|---------|------|
| `src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java` | **Android主Activity** - 音频解码、Sherpa-ONNX Java集成、文件选择、分享功能 |
| `src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/SettingsActivity.java` | **设置页面** - API密钥配置 |
| `src/main/python/engine.py` | **Python引擎桥接** - ASR转录、文本对比、报告生成，供Java调用 |
| `src/main/AndroidManifest.xml` | **Android清单** - 权限声明、Share Intent配置、FileProvider配置 |

#### 资源文件

| 路径 | 作用 |
|------|------|
| `src/main/assets/models/paraformer/` | **内置离线语音识别模型** (Paraformer中英文模型) |
| `src/main/res/layout/` | **Android布局文件** |
| `src/main/res/xml/file_paths.xml` | **FileProvider路径配置** - 用于安全分享文件 |
| `libs/sherpa-onnx-1.12.25.aar` | **Sherpa-ONNX Android库** (39MB) |

### 3. 文档对比功能实现

#### 核心算法

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\core\compare.py`**

**关键特性：**
- **分词：** 优先使用jieba分词，不可用时按字切分
- **序列比对：** 使用`difflib.SequenceMatcher`进行文本对比
- **同音字识别：** 集成pypinyin进行拼音比较
- **数字规范化：** 支持阿拉伯数字转中文读音
- **填充词过滤：** 过滤"嗯、呃、那个、就是"等口语填充词
- **时间戳映射：** 支持词级时间戳定位

**差异类型：**
- `mismatch` - 误读（原文与录音不一致）
- `missing_in_audio` - 漏读（录音中缺少）
- `extra_in_audio` - 多读（录音中额外出现）

**返回结果结构：**
```python
{
    'diffs': [
        {
            'type': 'mismatch',
            'docText': '原文',
            'audioText': '录音',
            'time_start': 12.3,
            'time_end': 15.6,
            'confidence': 0.95
        },
        ...
    ],
    'summary': '共X处差异：X处误读，X处漏读，X处多读\n字准确率 XX%',
    'accuracy': 95.5,
    'n_mismatch': 5,
    'n_missing': 2,
    'n_extra': 1
}
```

### 4. Word报告生成相关代码

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\core\report_gen.py`**

**功能：**
- 生成带颜色标注的Word文档
- 红色标注误读
- 蓝色标注漏读
- 绿色标注多读
- 包含时间戳信息
- 完整转写文本和原始文档对比
- 备用txt格式生成

**报告结构：**
```
1. 标题：配音文字核对报告
2. 基本信息：生成时间、录音文件、文档文件、准确率、差异统计
3. 差异详情：逐条列出差异，带颜色标注和时间戳
4. 完整转写文本
5. 原始文档文本
```

### 5. 录音/音频处理相关代码

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\core\transcribe.py` (Python侧)**
**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\java\com\voicedoc\app\MainActivity.java` (Java侧)**

**音频解码：**
- 支持 WAV/MP3/M4A/FLAC/AMR/OGG/OPUS/AAC/SILK 等格式
- 使用 `MediaCodec` 解码压缩音频
- 使用 `MediaExtractor` 提取音频轨道
- 自动重采样到16kHz单声道

**ASR引擎支持：**
1. **Sherpa-ONNX (离线)**
   - 使用Paraformer中英文模型
   - 模型文件：`model.int8.onnx` + `tokens.txt`
   - 长音频分段识别（每段30秒）
   
2. **百度语音 (云端)**
   - 内置API密钥
   - 自动分段突破60秒限制
   
3. **Groq Whisper (云端)**
   - 内置API密钥
   - Whisper Large V3模型
   
4. **OpenAI Whisper (云端)**
   - 需要用户配置API密钥
   
5. **FunASR (局域网)**
   - 连接电脑上的FunASR服务
   - 需要同一WiFi网络

### 6. 前端界面相关文件

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\main.py`**

**界面架构：**
- 使用 **Kivy框架** 构建跨平台UI
- 三个主要Screen：`home`（首页）、`settings`（设置）、`result`（结果）

**首页功能：**
- 录音文件选择按钮
- 文档文件选择按钮
- ASR引擎快捷选择
- "开始对比"按钮
- 状态显示和进度条

**设置页功能：**
- ASR引擎配置（离线模型下载、FunASR服务器地址、API密钥）
- LLM大模型配置（服务商选择、API密钥）
- 连接测试按钮

**结果页功能：**
- 准确率摘要显示
- 差异列表滚动显示
- "生成Word报告"按钮
- "分享到微信"按钮

### 7. 数据库或数据存储方式

**配置存储：**
- 位置：`Android SharedPreferences` 或 `~/.voice-doc-compare/config_apk.json`
- 存储内容：ASR引擎选择、API密钥、FunASR服务器地址等

**报告存储：**
- 位置：`~/reports/` 或应用私有目录
- 格式：`.docx` (Word) 或 `.txt` (纯文本备用)

**文件导入缓存：**
- 位置：应用缓存目录
- 处理微信分享的临时文件

**模型存储：**
- 内置模型：`src/main/assets/models/paraformer/`
- 动态下载模型：应用存储目录的`models/paraformer/`

### 8. 技术栈总结

| 层级 | 技术 |
|------|------|
| **UI框架** | Kivy (Python) |
| **Android集成** | Chaquo Python |
| **语音识别** | Sherpa-ONNX (Java) + 多种云端API (Python) |
| **文本对比** | difflib + jieba + pypinyin (Python) |
| **Word生成** | python-docx (Python) |
| **网络请求** | requests (Python) |
| **Android原生** | MediaCodec, MediaExtractor, FileProvider |
| **构建工具** | Gradle + Chaquo Python插件 |

这个项目是一个完整的**移动端配音文字核对工具**，支持离线和在线语音识别，具有智能文本对比、差异标注、报告生成和微信分享等功能。

    'diffs': [
        {
            'type': 'mismatch',
            'docText': '原文',
            'audioText': '录音',
            'time_start': 12.3,
            'time_end': 15.6,
            'confidence': 0.95
        },
        ...
    ],
    'summary': '共X处差异：X处误读，X处漏读，X处多读\n字准确率 XX%',
    'accuracy': 95.5,
    'n_mismatch': 5,
    'n_missing': 2,
    'n_extra': 1
}
```

### 4. Word报告生成相关代码

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\core\report_gen.py`**

**功能：**
- 生成带颜色标注的Word文档
- 红色标注误读
- 蓝色标注漏读
- 绿色标注多读
- 包含时间戳信息
- 完整转写文本和原始文档对比
- 备用txt格式生成

**报告结构：**
```
1. 标题：配音文字核对报告
2. 基本信息：生成时间、录音文件、文档文件、准确率、差异统计
3. 差异详情：逐条列出差异，带颜色标注和时间戳
4. 完整转写文本
5. 原始文档文本
```

### 5. 录音/音频处理相关代码

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\core\transcribe.py` (Python侧)**
**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\java\com\voicedoc\app\MainActivity.java` (Java侧)**

**音频解码：**
- 支持 WAV/MP3/M4A/FLAC/AMR/OGG/OPUS/AAC/SILK 等格式
- 使用 `MediaCodec` 解码压缩音频
- 使用 `MediaExtractor` 提取音频轨道
- 自动重采样到16kHz单声道

**ASR引擎支持：**
1. **Sherpa-ONNX (离线)**
   - 使用Paraformer中英文模型
   - 模型文件：`model.int8.onnx` + `tokens.txt`
   - 长音频分段识别（每段30秒）
   
2. **百度语音 (云端)**
   - 内置API密钥
   - 自动分段突破60秒限制
   
3. **Groq Whisper (云端)**
   - 内置API密钥
   - Whisper Large V3模型
   
4. **OpenAI Whisper (云端)**
   - 需要用户配置API密钥
   
5. **FunASR (局域网)**
   - 连接电脑上的FunASR服务
   - 需要同一WiFi网络

### 6. 前端界面相关文件

**位置：`d:\voicedoccompare\app\main.py`**

**界面架构：**
- 使用 **Kivy框架** 构建跨平台UI
- 三个主要Screen：`home`（首页）、`settings`（设置）、`result`（结果）

**首页功能：**
- 录音文件选择按钮
- 文档文件选择按钮
- ASR引擎快捷选择
- "开始对比"按钮
- 状态显示和进度条

**设置页功能：**
- ASR引擎配置（离线模型下载、FunASR服务器地址、API密钥）
- LLM大模型配置（服务商选择、API密钥）
- 连接测试按钮

**结果页功能：**
- 准确率摘要显示
- 差异列表滚动显示
- "生成Word报告"按钮
- "分享到微信"按钮

### 7. 数据库或数据存储方式

**配置存储：**
- 位置：`Android SharedPreferences` 或 `~/.voice-doc-compare/config_apk.json`
- 存储内容：ASR引擎选择、API密钥、FunASR服务器地址等

**报告存储：**
- 位置：`~/reports/` 或应用私有目录
- 格式：`.docx` (Word) 或 `.txt` (纯文本备用)

**文件导入缓存：**
- 位置：应用缓存目录
- 处理微信分享的临时文件

**模型存储：**
- 内置模型：`src/main/assets/models/paraformer/`
- 动态下载模型：应用存储目录的`models/paraformer/`

### 8. 技术栈总结

| 层级 | 技术 |
|------|------|
| **UI框架** | Kivy (Python) |
| **Android集成** | Chaquo Python |
| **语音识别** | Sherpa-ONNX (Java) + 多种云端API (Python) |
| **文本对比** | difflib + jieba + pypinyin (Python) |
| **Word生成** | python-docx (Python) |
| **网络请求** | requests (Python) |
| **Android原生** | MediaCodec, MediaExtractor, FileProvider |
| **构建工具** | Gradle + Chaquo Python插件 |

这个项目是一个完整的**移动端配音文字核对工具**，支持离线和在线语音识别，具有智能文本对比、差异标注、报告生成和微信分享等功能。

"""Word对比报告生成模块 - 生成带差异标注的Word文档"""
import os
import tempfile
from typing import List, Dict, Any
from datetime import datetime


def generate_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
                     doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
                     output_path: str = None) -> str:
    """
    生成Word格式的对比报告

    Args:
        audio_path: 录音文件路径
        doc_path: 文档文件路径
        audio_text: ASR转写文本
        doc_text: 原始文档文本
        result: compare_texts返回的对比结果
        output_path: 输出文件路径，默认自动生成

    Returns:
        生成的Word文件路径
    """
    try:
        from docx import Document
        from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt, Inches
        from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
        from docx.oxml.ns import qn
        from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
    except ImportError:
        # 如果没有python-docx，生成简化版txt
        return _generate_text_report(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, doc_text, result, output_path)

    doc = Document()

    # 设置中文字体
    def set_chinese_font(run, font_name='宋体', size=11):
        """设置中文字体"""
        run.font.name = font_name
        run._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), font_name)
        run.font.size = Pt(size)

    # 1. 标题
    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    title_run = title.add_run('配音文字核对报告')
    set_chinese_font(title_run, '黑体', 18)
    title_run.bold = True

    # 2. 基本信息
    doc.add_paragraph('\n基本信息：')
    info_table = doc.add_table(rows=5, cols=2)
    info_table.style = 'Light Grid Accent 1'

    def set_cell_text(table, row, col, text, font_size=10):
        cell = table.rows[row].cells[col]
        cell.text = text
        for para in cell.paragraphs:
            for run in para.runs:
                set_chinese_font(run, size=font_size)

    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 0, '生成时间')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 1, datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 0, '录音文件')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 1, os.path.basename(audio_path))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 0, '文档文件')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 1, os.path.basename(doc_path))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 0, '准确率')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 1, f'{result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 0, '差异统计')
    diff_count = result.get('n_mismatch', 0) + result.get('n_missing', 0) + result.get('n_extra', 0)
    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 1, f'共{diff_count}处 (误读{result.get("n_mismatch",0)} 漏读{result.get("n_missing",0)} 多读{result.get("n_extra",0)})')

    doc.add_paragraph()

    # 3. 差异详情
    doc.add_paragraph('差异详情：')
    doc.add_paragraph('（红色=误读，蓝色=漏读，绿色=多读，括号内为时间戳）')

    diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
    for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
        p = doc.add_paragraph(f'{i}. ', style='List Number')

        diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
        if diff_type == 'mismatch':
            # 误读 - 红色
            p.add_run(f'【误读】')
            doc_text_run = p.add_run(f' 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            doc_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(doc_text_run)

            p.add_run(' → ')
            audio_text_run = p.add_run(f'录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            audio_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(audio_text_run)

        elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
            # 漏读 - 蓝色
            p.add_run('【漏读】')
            miss_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            miss_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
            set_chinese_font(miss_run)

        else:  # extra_in_audio
            # 多读 - 绿色
            p.add_run('【多读】')
            extra_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            extra_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
            set_chinese_font(extra_run)

        # 时间戳
        if 'time_start' in diff:
            ts = diff['time_start']
            m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
            ts_run = p.add_run(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
            ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(100, 100, 100)
            ts_run.font.italic = True
            set_chinese_font(ts_run, size=9)

    # 4. 完整转写文本
    doc.add_page_break()
    doc.add_paragraph('完整转写文本：')
    p = doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(audio_text))

    # 5. 原始文档文本
    doc.add_page_break()
    doc.add_paragraph('原始文档文本：')
    p = doc.add_paragraph(doc_text)
    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(doc_text))

    # 保存文件
    if output_path is None:
        # 保存到应用数据目录
        try:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                base_dir = app_storage_path()
            else:
                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
        except:
            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')

        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)

        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.docx')

    doc.save(output_path)
    return output_path


def _generate_text_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
                          doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
                          output_path: str = None) -> str:
    """生成纯文本格式的报告（备用方案）"""
    if output_path is None:
        try:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                base_dir = app_storage_path()
            else:
                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
        except:
            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')

        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)

        from datetime import datetime
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.txt')

    with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')

        f.write(f'生成时间: {datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}\n')
        f.write(f'录音文件: {os.path.basename(audio_path)}\n')
        f.write(f'文档文件: {os.path.basename(doc_path)}\n')
        f.write(f'准确率: {result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%\n\n')

        f.write('差异详情：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')

        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
        for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
            diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
            if diff_type == 'mismatch':
                f.write(f'{i}. [误读] 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")} → 录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
                f.write(f'{i}. [漏读] {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            else:
                f.write(f'{i}. [多读] {diff.get("audioText", "")}')

            if 'time_start' in diff:
                ts = diff['time_start']
                m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
                f.write(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
            f.write('\n')

        f.write('\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('完整转写文本：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
        f.write(audio_text)
        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('原始文档文本：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
        f.write(doc_text)

    return output_path

def share_to_wechat(file_path: str) -> bool:
    """
    分享文件到微信

    Args:
        file_path: 要分享的文件路径

    Returns:
        是否成功
    """
    try:
        from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
        if kv_platform != 'android':
            return False

        from jnius import autoclass
        Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
        PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
        Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
        File = autoclass('java.io.File')

        activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
        file_obj = File(file_path)
        uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)

        intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
        intent.setType('*/*')
        intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
        intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)

        # 尝试直接分享到微信
        intent.setPackage('com.tencent.mm')

        activity.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享到微信'))
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'分享失败: {e}')
        return False

1→"""核心对比算法 - 移植自桌面版 compare.py，适配Android"""
     2→import re
     3→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→
     6→# 填充词过滤
     7→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶',
     8→                '那个', '就是', '就是说', '然后', '对吧', '对的', '这个'}
     9→
    10→CN_NUMBERS_READING = {
    11→    '0': '零', '1': '一', '2': '二', '3': '三', '4': '四',
    12→    '5': '五', '6': '六', '7': '七', '8': '八', '9': '九'
    13→}
    14→
    15→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'"()\[\]{}\-]')
    16→
    17→
    18→def _normalize(text):
    19→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    20→
    21→
    22→def _is_punct(ch):
    23→    return bool(_RE_PUNCT.match(ch))
    24→
    25→
    26→def _segment(text):
    27→    """分词：优先用jieba，不可用时按字切分"""
    28→    try:
    29→        import jieba
    30→        return [w for w in jieba.cut(text) if w.strip()]
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # Android上jieba可能不可用，按字切分
    33→        return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    34→
    35→
    36→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    37→    """拼音比较：字数相同且每个字读音（含声调）一致则视为合格
    38→    支持中文同音字、数字读音、英语大小写等场景
    39→    """
    40→    if not a or not b:
    41→        return False
    42→    a_clean = _normalize(a)
    43→    b_clean = _normalize(b)
    44→    if not a_clean or not b_clean:
    45→        return False
    46→    if a_clean == b_clean:
    47→        return True
    48→    # 英语大小写不敏感
    49→    if a_clean.lower() == b_clean.lower():
    50→        return True
    51→    # 数字规范化后比较
    52→    a_num = _normalize_number_reading(a_clean)
    53→    b_num = _normalize_number_reading(b_clean)
    54→    if a_num == b_num:
    55→        return True
    56→    # 字数不同直接返回False
    57→    if len(a_clean) != len(b_clean):
    58→        # 但数字展开后字数可能不同，用拼音再试
    59→        pass
    60→    try:
    61→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    62→        # 用TONE3风格：带声调数字 (如 zhong1, guo2)
    63→        # 先用原始文本比较
    64→        pa = pinyin(a_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    65→        pb = pinyin(b_clean, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    66→        if pa == pb:
    67→            return True
    68→        # 数字规范化后再用拼音比较
    69→        pa_num = pinyin(a_num, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    70→        pb_num = pinyin(b_num, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    71→        if pa_num == pb_num:
    72→            return True
    73→    except ImportError:
    74→        pass
    75→    return False
    76→
    77→
    78→def _arabic_to_chinese(num_str, is_year=False):
    79→    if not num_str or not num_str.isdigit():
    80→        return num_str
    81→    if is_year:
    82→        return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    83→    try:
    84→        num = int(num_str)
    85→        if num < 10:
    86→            return CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str]
    87→        elif num < 20:
    88→            return '十' + (CN_NUMBERS_READING[num_str[1]] if num_str[1] != '0' else '')
    89→        elif num < 100:
    90→            t, o = num // 10, num % 10
    91→            r = CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(t)] + '十'
    92→            if o > 0:
    93→                r += CN_NUMBERS_READING[str(o)]
    94→            return r
    95→        else:
    96→            return ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in num_str)
    97→    except:
    98→        return num_str
    99→
   100→
   101→def _normalize_number_reading(text):
   102→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUMBERS_READING.get(d, d) for d in m.group(1)) + '年', text)
   103→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之' + _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
   104→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: _arabic_to_chinese(m.group(1)), result)
   105→    return re.sub(r'\s+', '', result)
   106→
   107→
   108→def _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, word_pos, doc_words):
   109→    char_offset = sum(len(w) for w in doc_words[:word_pos])
   110→    running = 0
   111→    for idx, p in enumerate(doc_paragraphs):
   112→        plen = len(_normalize(p))
   113→        if running + plen > char_offset:
   114→            return idx
   115→        running += plen
   116→    return len(doc_paragraphs) - 1
   117→
   118→
   119→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=None, confidence_threshold=0.0):
   120→    """核心对比算法：jieba分词 + SequenceMatcher + 拼音同音字识别"""
   121→    doc_paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   122→
   123→    audio_norm = _normalize(audio_text)
   124→    doc_norm = _normalize(doc_text)
   125→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
   126→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
   127→
   128→    # 时间戳映射
   129→    ts_map = {}
   130→    if word_timestamps:
   131→        offset = 0
   132→        for wt in word_timestamps:
   133→            w_norm = _normalize(wt['word'])
   134→            for i in range(len(w_norm)):
   135→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': wt['start'], 'end': wt['end'], 'confidence': wt.get('confidence', 1.0)}
   136→            offset += len(w_norm)
   137→
   138→    # 序列比对
   139→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   140→    raw_diffs = []
   141→
   142→    audio_char_offsets = []
   143→    off = 0
   144→    for w in audio_words:
   145→        audio_char_offsets.append(off)
   146→        off += len(w)
   147→
   148→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   149→        if tag == 'equal':
   150→            continue
   151→
   152→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   153→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   154→
   155→        # 过滤填充词
   156→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   157→            continue
   158→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   159→            continue
   160→        if tag == 'replace':
   161→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   162→                continue
   163→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   164→                continue
   165→
   166→        # 跳过纯标点差异
   167→        if all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in doc_frag) and all(_is_punct(c) or not c.strip() for c in audio_frag):
   168→            continue
   169→
   170→        pos = _find_paragraph(doc_paragraphs, i1, doc_words)
   171→
   172→        # 获取时间戳
   173→        ts_start = ts_end = None
   174→        confidence = 1.0
   175→        if ts_map and j1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   176→            char_off = audio_char_offsets[j1]
   177→            if char_off in ts_map:
   178→                ts_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   179→                confidence = ts_map[char_off]['confidence']
   180→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_char_offsets):
   181→                end_off = audio_char_offsets[j2 - 1]
   182→                if end_off in ts_map:
   183→                    ts_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   184→
   185→        diff_entry = {
   186→            'docText': doc_frag,
   187→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   188→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing_in_audio' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra_in_audio'),
   189→            'position': pos,
   190→            'confidence': confidence,
   191→        }
   192→        if ts_start is not None:
   193→            diff_entry['time_start'] = ts_start
   194→        if ts_end is not None:
   195→            diff_entry['time_end'] = ts_end
   196→        raw_diffs.append(diff_entry)
   197→
   198→    # 统计
   199→    n_mismatch = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   200→    n_missing = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio')
   201→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in raw_diffs if d['type'] == 'extra_in_audio')
   202→
   203→    # 字准确率
   204→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
   205→    diff_chars = sum(max(len(d['docText']), len(d['audioText'])) for d in raw_diffs)
   206→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - diff_chars / total) * 100)
   207→
   208→    summary = f'共{len(raw_diffs)}处差异：{n_mismatch}处误读，{n_missing}处漏读，{n_extra}处多读\n字准确率 {accuracy:.1f}%'
   209→
   210→    return {
   211→        'diffs': raw_diffs,
   212→        'summary': summary,
   213→        'accuracy': accuracy,
   214→        'n_mismatch': n_mismatch,
   215→        'n_missing': n_missing,
   216→        'n_extra': n_extra,
   217→    }
   218→

   693→
   694→class VoiceDocApp(App):
   695→    # --- 首页属性 ---
   696→    audio_path = StringProperty('')

   748→    def _config_path(self):
   749→        if platform == 'android':
   750→            from android.storage import app_storage_path

   754→    def _load_config(self):
   755→        self._config = {
   756→            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
   757→            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
   758→            'asr_keys': {},
   759→            'llm_keys': {},
   760→        }
   761→        try:
   762→            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   763→                self._config.update(json.load(f))
   764→        except Exception:
   765→            pass
   766→
   767→        # 加载 ASR
   768→        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
   769→        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
   770→        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
   771→            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')
   772→
   773→        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
   774→        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
   775→        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
   776→            # 用户自定义了密钥
   777→            self.groq_key = groq_saved
   778→            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
   779→        else:
   780→            # 使用内置密钥
   781→            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
   782→            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
   783→            # 保存内置密钥到配置
   784→            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
   785→
   786→        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
   787→            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
   788→
   789→        # 加载 LLM
   790→        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
   791→        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
   792→        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
   793→        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
   794→        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
   795→            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')
   796→
   797→    def _save_config(self):
   798→        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
   799→        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
   800→        try:
   801→            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
   802→            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
   803→            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   804→                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
   805→        except Exception:
   806→            pass

   869→    def _check_model_status(self):
   870→        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
   871→        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
   872→        if os.path.exists(model_file):

   880→    def download_model_async(self):
   881→        if self.model_downloading:
   882→            return
   883→        self.model_downloading = True
   884→        self.model_dl_progress = 0
   885→        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
   886→        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

   888→    def _download_model_thread(self):
   889→        try:
   890→            from core.model_download import download_model
   891→            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
   892→
   893→            def progress_cb(msg):
   894→                # 解析百分比
   895→                import re
   896→                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
   897→                if m:
   898→                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
   899→                else:
   900→                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)
   901→
   902→            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
   903→            self._update_ui(
   904→                model_ready=True,
   905→                model_status='下载完成',
   906→                model_downloading=False,
   907→                model_dl_progress=100,
   908→            )
   909→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
   910→        except Exception as e:
   911→            self._update_ui(
   912→                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
   913→                model_downloading=False,
   914→            )

   949→    def _test_llm_thread(self):
   950→        import requests
   951→        pid = self.llm_provider
   952→        key = self.llm_key
   953→        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
   954→        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
   955→        model = info.get('default_model', '')
   956→
   957→        try:
   958→            if pid == 'claude':
   959→                headers = {
   960→                    'x-api-key': key,
   961→                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
   962→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   963→                }
   964→                data = {
   965→                    'model': model,
   966→                    'max_tokens': 10,
   967→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   968→                }
   969→            elif pid == 'zhipu':
   970→                # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token认证
   971→                # 智谱API Key格式通常为 xxx.yyy 形式
   972→                headers = {
   973→                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
   974→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   975→                }
   976→                data = {
   977→                    'model': model,
   978→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   979→                    'max_tokens': 10,
   980→                    'stream': False,
   981→                }
   982→            else:
   983→                headers = {
   984→                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
   985→                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   986→                }
   987→                data = {
   988→                    'model': model,
   989→                    'max_tokens': 10,
   990→                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   991→                }
   992→
   993→            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
   994→            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
   995→                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
   996→            else:
   997→                # 解析错误信息
   998→                try:
   999→                    err_data = resp.json()
  1000→                    err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
  1001→                except:
  1002→                    err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
  1003→                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'HTTP {resp.status_code}: {err_msg}')
  1004→        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
  1005→            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接失败，请检查网络')
  1006→        except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
  1007→            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接超时，请重试')
  1008→        except Exception as e:
  1009→            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:40]}')

  1062→    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
  1063→        try:
  1064→            from jnius import autoclass
  1065→            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
  1066→            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
  1067→            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
  1068→            if file_type == 'audio':
  1069→                intent.setType('audio/*')
  1070→            else:
  1071→                intent.setType('application/*')
  1072→            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
  1073→            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
  1074→        except Exception as e:
  1075→            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1076→
  1077→    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
  1078→        try:
  1079→            from plyer import filechooser
  1080→            if file_type == 'audio':
  1081→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
  1082→                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
  1083→            else:
  1084→                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
  1085→                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
  1086→            if paths:
  1087→                p = paths[0]
  1088→                if file_type == 'audio':
  1089→                    self.audio_path = p
  1090→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
  1091→                else:
  1092→                    self.doc_path = p
  1093→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
  1094→        except Exception:
  1095→            pass
  1096→
  1097→    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

  1099→    def _check_intent(self):
  1100→        if platform != 'android':
  1101→            return
  1102→        try:
  1103→            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
  1104→            files = get_android_shared_files()
  1105→            if not files:
  1106→                return
  1107→            from android.storage import app_storage_path
  1108→            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
  1109→            for f in files:
  1110→                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
  1111→                ftype = classify_file(local)
  1112→                if ftype == 'audio':
  1113→                    self.audio_path = local
  1114→                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
  1115→                elif ftype == 'doc':
  1116→                    self.doc_path = local
  1117→                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
  1118→            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
  1119→                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
  1120→        except Exception as e:
  1121→            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1122→
  1123→    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================
  1124→
  1125→    def start_compare(self):
  1126→        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
  1127→            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
  1128→            return
  1129→        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
  1130→        self.progress = 0
  1131→        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()
  1132→
  1133→    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
  1134→        def _do(dt):
  1135→            for k, v in kwargs.items():
  1136→                setattr(self, k, v)
  1137→        Clock.schedule_once(_do)
  1138→
  1139→    def _do_compare(self):
  1140→        try:
  1141→            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
  1142→            from core.compare import compare_texts
  1143→            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt
  1144→
  1145→            # 步骤1: 转录
  1146→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
  1147→            keys = dict(self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {}))
  1148→            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
  1149→                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
  1150→            # Groq使用内置密钥
  1151→            if self.asr_provider == 'groq_whisper' and not keys.get('key'):
  1152→                keys['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
  1153→            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
  1154→                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
  1155→                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
  1156→            )
  1157→            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')
  1158→
  1159→            # 步骤2: 解析文档
  1160→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
  1161→            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
  1162→            if ext == '.txt':
  1163→                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
  1164→            else:
  1165→                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
  1166→            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
  1167→
  1168→            # 步骤3: 对比
  1169→            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
  1170→            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
  1171→            self._update_ui(progress=95)
  1172→
  1173→            # 保存结果供报告生成使用
  1174→            self._last_audio_text = audio_text
  1175→            self._last_doc_text = doc_text
  1176→            self._last_result = result
  1177→            self._last_report_path = ''
  1178→
  1179→            # 构建结果
  1180→            diffs = result['diffs']
  1181→            items = []
  1182→            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
  1183→            for d in diffs:
  1184→                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
  1185→                ts = ''
  1186→                if 'time_start' in d:
  1187→                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
  1188→                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
  1189→                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
  1190→                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
  1191→                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
  1192→                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
  1193→                else:
  1194→                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
  1195→                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})
  1196→
  1197→            self._update_ui(
  1198→                progress=100,
  1199→                status_text='对比完成',
  1200→                result_summary=result['summary'],
  1201→                diff_items=items,
  1202→            )
  1203→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))
  1204→
  1205→        except Exception as e:
  1206→            import traceback
  1207→            traceback.print_exc()
  1208→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)
  1209→
  1210→    # ==================== Word报告生成 ====================
  1211→
  1212→    def generate_word_report(self):
  1213→        """生成Word对比报告"""
  1214→        if not self._last_result:
  1215→            self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
  1216→            return
  1217→        self.status_text = '正在生成报告...'
  1218→        threading.Thread(target=self._gen_report_thread, daemon=True).start()
  1219→
  1220→    def _gen_report_thread(self):
  1221→        try:
  1222→            from core.report_gen import generate_report
  1223→            path = generate_report(
  1224→                audio_path=self.audio_path,
  1225→                doc_path=self.doc_path,
  1226→                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
  1227→                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
  1228→                result=self._last_result,
  1229→            )
  1230→            self._last_report_path = path
  1231→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告已保存: {os.path.basename(path)}')
  1232→        except Exception as e:
  1233→            import traceback
  1234→            traceback.print_exc()
  1235→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告生成失败: {str(e)[:50]}')
  1236→
  1237→    # ==================== 微信分享 ====================
  1238→
  1239→    def share_to_wechat(self):
  1240→        """分享报告到微信"""
  1241→        if not self._last_report_path:
  1242→            # 先生成报告再分享
  1243→            if not self._last_result:
  1244→                self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
  1245→                return
  1246→            self.status_text = '正在生成并分享...'
  1247→            threading.Thread(target=self._gen_and_share_thread, daemon=True).start()
  1248→        else:
  1249→            self._do_share(self._last_report_path)
  1250→
  1251→    def _gen_and_share_thread(self):
  1252→        try:
  1253→            from core.report_gen import generate_report
  1254→            path = generate_report(
  1255→                audio_path=self.audio_path,
  1256→                doc_path=self.doc_path,
  1257→                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
  1258→                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
  1259→                result=self._last_result,
  1260→            )
  1261→            self._last_report_path = path
  1262→            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._do_share(path))
  1263→        except Exception as e:
  1264→            self._update_ui(status_text=f'生成报告失败: {str(e)[:50]}')
  1265→
  1266→    def _do_share(self, file_path):
  1267→        """执行分享操作"""
  1268→        if platform == 'android':
  1269→            try:
  1270→                from jnius import autoclass
  1271→                Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
  1272→                PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
  1273→                Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
  1274→                File = autoclass('java.io.File')
  1275→                FileProvider = autoclass('androidx.core.content.FileProvider')
  1276→
  1277→                activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
  1278→                file_obj = File(file_path)
  1279→
  1280→                # 使用FileProvider获取content URI（Android 7.0+）
  1281→                try:
  1282→                    uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
  1283→                        activity,
  1284→                        activity.getPackageName() + '.fileprovider',
  1285→                        file_obj
  1286→                    )
  1287→                except Exception:
  1288→                    uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)
  1289→
  1290→                intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
  1291→                intent.setType('application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document')
  1292→                intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
  1293→                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
  1294→
  1295→                chooser = Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享核对报告')
  1296→                activity.startActivity(chooser)
  1297→                self.status_text = '已打开分享面板'
  1298→            except Exception as e:
  1299→                self.status_text = f'分享失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
  1300→        else:
  1301→            self.status_text = f'报告已保存: {file_path}'
  1302→
  1303→
  1304→if __name__ == '__main__':
  1305→    VoiceDocApp().run()
  1306→

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty, BooleanProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

from core.config import (
    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.96, 0.96, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(52)
        padding: dp(12), 0
        spacing: dp(8)
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size

        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(19)
            bold: True
            color: 1, 1, 1, 1
            halign: 'left'
            valign: 'center'
            text_size: self.size

        Button:
            text: '返回' if sm.current != 'home' else '配置'
            size_hint_x: None
            width: dp(60)
            font_size: dp(14)
            background_color: 0.15, 0.5, 0.75, 1
            background_normal: ''
            on_release: sm.current = 'home' if sm.current != 'home' else 'settings'

    # ScreenManager

        id: sm

        # ==================== 首页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'home'
            ScrollView:
                do_scroll_x: False
                BoxLayout:
                    orientation: 'vertical'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: self.minimum_height
                    padding: dp(14)
                    spacing: dp(10)

                    # 微信导入提示
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(56)
                        padding: dp(10)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 0.88, 0.95, 0.88, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]
                        Label:
                            text: '微信长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用 即可导入'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.2, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'center'
                            valign: 'center'

                    # 录音文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择录音'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_audio()
                        Label:
                            text: app.audio_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # 文档文件
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(50)
                        spacing: dp(8)
                        Button:
                            text: '选择文档'
                            size_hint_x: 0.3
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.pick_doc()
                        Label:
                            text: app.doc_name or '未选择'
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            text_size: self.size
                            halign: 'left'
                            valign: 'center'
                            shorten: True

                    # ASR引擎快捷选择
                    BoxLayout:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(44)
                        spacing: dp(8)

                            text: '识别引擎:'

                            font_size: dp(13)
                            color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                            halign: 'right'

                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: home_asr_spinner

                            values: app.asr_names

                    # 开始对比
                    Button:
                        text: '开始对比'
                        size_hint_y: None

                    # 状态
                    Label:

                    ProgressBar:

        # ==================== 设置页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'settings'

                do_scroll_x: False

                    # ---- 语音转写配置标题 ----
                    Label:

                    # ASR引擎选择
                    BoxLayout:

                            halign: 'right'

                            valign: 'center'
                        Spinner:
                            id: settings_asr_spinner
                            text: app.asr_display

                            size_hint_x: 0.75
                            font_size: dp(13)
                            on_text: app.on_asr_change(self.text)

                    # ==== Card: 离线识别模型 ====
                    BoxLayout:
                        orientation: 'vertical'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: self.minimum_height
                        padding: dp(12)
                        spacing: dp(6)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 1, 1, 1, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]

                        Label:
                            text: '离线识别模型 (Sherpa-ONNX)'

                            font_size: dp(15)
                            bold: True
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.8, 1
                            halign: 'left'
                            text_size: self.size

                        Label:
                            text: 'Paraformer 中英文语音识别，无需联网，模型已内置APK'
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(20)
                            font_size: dp(11)
                            color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                            halign: 'left'
                            text_size: self.size

                        BoxLayout:
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(34)
                            spacing: dp(8)
                            Label:
                                text: app.model_status
                                font_size: dp(13)
                                color: (0.2, 0.65, 0.2, 1) if app.model_ready else (0.8, 0.3, 0.3, 1)
                                halign: 'left'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'
                            Button:
                                text: '重新下载' if app.model_ready else '下载模型'
                                size_hint_x: None
                                width: dp(90)
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                background_color: (0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1) if app.model_ready else (0.2, 0.65, 0.3, 1)
                                background_normal: ''
                                on_release: app.download_model_async()
                                disabled: app.model_downloading

                        ProgressBar:
                            value: app.model_dl_progress
                            max: 100
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(4) if app.model_downloading else 0
                            opacity: 1 if app.model_downloading else 0

                    # ==== Card: FunASR 局域网 ====
                    BoxLayout:
                        orientation: 'vertical'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: self.minimum_height
                        padding: dp(12)
                        spacing: dp(6)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 1, 1, 1, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]

                        Label:
                            text: 'FunASR 局域网转录'

                        Label:

                                on_focus: if not self.focus: app.save_api_key('groq_whisper', self.text)

                        BoxLayout:

                            Label:
                                text: 'OpenAI Key:'
                                size_hint_x: 0.28

                                valign: 'center'
                            TextInput:
                                id: openai_key_input

                                size_hint_x: 0.72
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                multiline: False

                                on_focus: if not self.focus: app.save_api_key('openai_whisper', self.text)

                        # ASR独立保存按钮
                        Button:
                            text: '保存ASR配置'
                            size_hint_y: None

                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1

                            on_release: app.save_asr_settings()

                    # ---- 大模型配置标题 ----
                    Label:
                        text: '大模型配置'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(32)
                        font_size: dp(17)
                        bold: True
                        color: 0.15, 0.15, 0.15, 1
                        halign: 'left'
                        text_size: self.size
                        valign: 'center'

                    # ==== Card: LLM 大模型 ====
                    BoxLayout:
                        orientation: 'vertical'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: self.minimum_height
                        padding: dp(12)
                        spacing: dp(6)
                        canvas.before:
                            Color:
                                rgba: 1, 1, 1, 1
                            RoundedRectangle:
                                pos: self.pos
                                size: self.size
                                radius: [dp(8)]

                        Label:
                            text: '选择大模型服务商'
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(26)
                            font_size: dp(15)
                            bold: True
                            color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.8, 1
                            halign: 'left'
                            text_size: self.size

                        Label:
                            text: '用于智能纠错、内容总结等AI增强功能'
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(20)
                            font_size: dp(11)
                            color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                            halign: 'left'
                            text_size: self.size

                        Spinner:
                            id: llm_spinner
