                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(40)

                            on_text: app.on_llm_change(self.text)

                        BoxLayout:
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(38)
                            spacing: dp(6)
                            Label:
                                text: 'API Key:'
                                size_hint_x: 0.22
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                color: 0.3, 0.3, 0.3, 1
                                halign: 'right'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'
                            TextInput:
                                id: llm_key_input
                                text: app.llm_key
                                hint_text: '输入API密钥'
                                size_hint_x: 0.78
                                font_size: dp(12)

                                password: True
                                on_focus: if not self.focus: app.save_llm_key(self.text)

                        BoxLayout:
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(22)
                            spacing: dp(4)
                            Label:
                                text: '模型:'
                                size_hint_x: 0.15
                                font_size: dp(11)
                                color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                                halign: 'right'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'
                            Label:
                                text: app.llm_model_name
                                size_hint_x: 0.85
                                font_size: dp(11)
                                color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
                                halign: 'left'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'

                        BoxLayout:
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(36)
                            spacing: dp(8)
                            Button:
                                text: '测试连接'
                                size_hint_x: 0.3
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                                background_normal: ''
                                on_release: app.test_llm()
                            Label:
                                text: app.llm_test_result
                                size_hint_x: 0.7
                                font_size: dp(12)
                                color: 0.4, 0.4, 0.4, 1
                                halign: 'left'
                                text_size: self.size
                                valign: 'center'

                        # LLM独立保存按钮
                        Button:
                            text: '保存大模型配置'
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: dp(42)
                            font_size: dp(14)
                            background_color: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
                            background_normal: ''
                            on_release: app.save_llm_settings()

                    # 完成并返回按钮
                    Button:
                        text: '完成并返回'
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(48)
                        font_size: dp(16)
                        background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.return_from_settings()

                    # 底部间距
                    Widget:
                        size_hint_y: None
                        height: dp(20)

        # ==================== 结果页 ====================
        Screen:
            name: 'result'
            BoxLayout:
                orientation: 'vertical'
                padding: dp(12)
                spacing: dp(8)

                Label:
                    text: app.result_summary
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(80)
                    font_size: dp(15)
                    color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
                    text_size: self.width, None
                    halign: 'center'

                ScrollView:
                    RecycleView:
                        id: diff_rv
                        viewclass: 'DiffItem'
                        data: app.diff_items
                        RecycleBoxLayout:
                            orientation: 'vertical'
                            default_size: None, dp(72)
                            default_size_hint: 1, None
                            size_hint_y: None
                            height: self.minimum_height
                            spacing: dp(4)

                # 操作按钮区
                BoxLayout:
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    spacing: dp(8)

                    Button:
                        text: '生成Word报告'
                        size_hint_x: 1
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        background_color: 0.2, 0.5, 0.8, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.generate_word_report()

                    Button:
                        text: '分享到微信'
                        size_hint_x: 1
                        font_size: dp(14)
                        background_color: 0.2, 0.7, 0.4, 1
                        background_normal: ''
                        on_release: app.share_to_wechat()

                Button:
                    text: '返回首页'
                    size_hint_y: None
                    height: dp(48)
                    font_size: dp(16)
                    background_color: 0.5, 0.5, 0.5, 1
                    background_normal: ''
                    on_release: sm.current = 'home'


<DiffItem@BoxLayout>:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    padding: dp(8)
    spacing: dp(2)
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 1, 0.95, 0.95, 1
        RoundedRectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size
            radius: [dp(6)]
    Label:
        text: root.diff_type if hasattr(root, 'diff_type') else ''
        font_size: dp(12)
        color: 0.8, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.3
    Label:
        text: root.diff_detail if hasattr(root, 'diff_detail') else ''
        font_size: dp(14)
        color: 0.2, 0.2, 0.2, 1
        halign: 'left'
        text_size: self.size
        size_hint_y: 0.7
'''


class VoiceDocApp(App):
    # --- 首页属性 ---
    audio_path = StringProperty('')
    audio_name = StringProperty('')
    doc_path = StringProperty('')
    doc_name = StringProperty('')
    status_text = StringProperty('就绪')
    progress = NumericProperty(0)
    result_summary = StringProperty('')
    diff_items = ListProperty([])

    # --- 对比结果存储（用于生成报告） ---
    _last_audio_text = ''
    _last_doc_text = ''
    _last_result = {}
    _last_report_path = ''

    # --- ASR 属性 ---
    asr_provider = StringProperty('sherpa_offline')
    asr_display = StringProperty('离线识别(内置)')
    asr_names = ListProperty(ASR_NAMES)
    funasr_server = StringProperty('http://192.168.1.100:8765')
    funasr_test_result = StringProperty('')
    groq_key = StringProperty('')
    groq_key_display = StringProperty('已内置密钥')  # 显示用
    openai_key = StringProperty('')

    # --- Groq内置密钥 ---
    GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY = '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'

    # --- 离线模型属性 ---
    model_ready = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_status = StringProperty('检查中...')
    model_downloading = BooleanProperty(False)
    model_dl_progress = NumericProperty(0)

    # --- LLM 属性 ---
    llm_provider = StringProperty('zhipu')
    llm_display = StringProperty('智谱GLM')
    llm_names = ListProperty(LLM_NAMES)
    llm_key = StringProperty('')
    llm_model_name = StringProperty('glm-4-flash')
    llm_test_result = StringProperty('')

    def build(self):
        self.title = '配音文字核对宝'
        self._load_config()
        root = Builder.load_string(KV)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_intent(), 1)
        Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 2)
        return root

    # ==================== 配置管理 ====================

    def _config_path(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'config.json')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.voice-doc-compare', 'config_apk.json')

    def _load_config(self):
        self._config = {
            'asr_provider': 'sherpa_offline',
            'llm_provider': 'zhipu',
            'asr_keys': {},
            'llm_keys': {},
        }
        try:
            with open(self._config_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                self._config.update(json.load(f))
        except Exception:
            pass

        # 加载 ASR
        self.asr_provider = self._config.get('asr_provider', 'sherpa_offline')
        self.asr_display = ASR_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.asr_provider, '离线识别(内置)')
        self.funasr_server = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'funasr', {}).get('server_url', 'http://192.168.1.100:8765')

        # Groq Key: 优先使用配置的，否则使用内置密钥
        groq_saved = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get('groq_whisper', {}).get('key', '')
        if groq_saved and groq_saved != self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY:
            # 用户自定义了密钥
            self.groq_key = groq_saved
            self.groq_key_display = groq_saved[:8] + '...' if len(groq_saved) > 8 else groq_saved
        else:
            # 使用内置密钥
            self.groq_key = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            self.groq_key_display = '已内置密钥'
            # 保存内置密钥到配置
            self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('groq_whisper', {})['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY

        self.openai_key = self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(
            'openai_whisper', {}).get('key', '')

        # 加载 LLM
        self.llm_provider = self._config.get('llm_provider', 'zhipu')
        self.llm_display = LLM_MAP_REVERSE.get(self.llm_provider, '智谱GLM')
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(self.llm_provider, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', 'glm-4-flash')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(
            self.llm_provider, {}).get('key', '')

    def _save_config(self):
        self._config['asr_provider'] = self.asr_provider
        self._config['llm_provider'] = self.llm_provider
        try:
            d = os.path.dirname(self._config_path())
            os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
            with open(self._config_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
                json.dump(self._config, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== ASR 设置 ====================

    def on_asr_change(self, text):
        new_id = ASR_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.asr_provider:
            return
        self.asr_provider = new_id
        self.asr_display = text
        self._save_config()

    def save_funasr_ip(self, ip_text):
        ip_text = ip_text.strip()
        if not ip_text:
            return
        if not ip_text.startswith('http'):
            if ':' not in ip_text:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}:8765'
            else:
                ip_text = f'http://{ip_text}'
        self.funasr_server = ip_text
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault('funasr', {})['server_url'] = ip_text
        self._save_config()

    def save_api_key(self, provider, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self._config.setdefault('asr_keys', {}).setdefault(provider, {})['key'] = key
        if provider == 'groq_whisper':
            self.groq_key = key
        elif provider == 'openai_whisper':
            self.openai_key = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_funasr(self):
        self.funasr_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_funasr_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_funasr_thread(self):
        import requests
        url = self.funasr_server.rstrip('/')
        try:
            r = requests.get(f'{url}/health', timeout=5)
            if r.status_code == 200:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'服务异常: HTTP {r.status_code}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result='无法连接，请检查IP和WiFi')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(funasr_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:30]}')

    # ==================== 离线模型管理 ====================

    def _get_model_dir(self):
        builtin = os.path.join(APP_DIR, 'models', 'paraformer')
        if os.path.exists(os.path.join(builtin, 'model.int8.onnx')):
            return builtin
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            return os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'models', 'paraformer')
        return os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), '.sherpa-onnx', 'paraformer')

    def _check_model_status(self):
        model_dir = self._get_model_dir()
        model_file = os.path.join(model_dir, 'model.int8.onnx')
        if os.path.exists(model_file):
            size_mb = os.path.getsize(model_file) // (1024 * 1024)
            self.model_ready = True
            self.model_status = f'已就绪 ({size_mb}MB)'
        else:
            self.model_ready = False
            self.model_status = '未下载 (约80MB)'

    def download_model_async(self):
        if self.model_downloading:
            return
        self.model_downloading = True
        self.model_dl_progress = 0
        self.model_status = '正在下载...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._download_model_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _download_model_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.model_download import download_model
            model_dir = self._get_model_dir()

            def progress_cb(msg):
                # 解析百分比
                import re
                m = re.search(r'(\d+)%', msg)
                if m:
                    self._update_ui(model_dl_progress=int(m.group(1)), model_status=msg)
                else:
                    self._update_ui(model_status=msg)

            download_model(model_dir, progress_cb)
            self._update_ui(
                model_ready=True,
                model_status='下载完成',
                model_downloading=False,
                model_dl_progress=100,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._check_model_status(), 1)
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(
                model_status=f'下载失败: {str(e)[:40]}',
                model_downloading=False,
            )

    # ==================== LLM 设置 ====================

    def on_llm_change(self, text):
        new_id = LLM_MAP.get(text)
        if not new_id or new_id == self.llm_provider:
            return
        # 保存旧的key
        if self.llm_key:
            self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
                self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = self.llm_key

        self.llm_provider = new_id
        self.llm_display = text
        llm_info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(new_id, {})
        self.llm_model_name = llm_info.get('default_model', '')
        self.llm_key = self._config.get('llm_keys', {}).get(new_id, {}).get('key', '')
        self.llm_test_result = ''
        self._save_config()

    def save_llm_key(self, key):
        key = key.strip()
        self.llm_key = key
        self._config.setdefault('llm_keys', {}).setdefault(
            self.llm_provider, {})['key'] = key
        self._save_config()

    def test_llm(self):
        if not self.llm_key:
            self.llm_test_result = '请先输入API Key'
            return
        self.llm_test_result = '正在测试...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._test_llm_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _test_llm_thread(self):
        import requests
        pid = self.llm_provider
        key = self.llm_key
        info = LLM_PROVIDERS.get(pid, {})
        endpoint = info.get('endpoint', '')
        model = info.get('default_model', '')

        try:
            if pid == 'claude':
                headers = {
                    'x-api-key': key,
                    'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }
            elif pid == 'zhipu':
                # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token认证
                # 智谱API Key格式通常为 xxx.yyy 形式
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'stream': False,
                }
            else:
                headers = {
                    'Authorization': f'Bearer {key}',
                    'Content-Type': 'application/json',
                }
                data = {
                    'model': model,
                    'max_tokens': 10,
                    'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
                }

            resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
            if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接成功')
            else:
                # 解析错误信息
                try:
                    err_data = resp.json()
                    err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
                except:
                    err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else f'HTTP {resp.status_code}'
                self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'HTTP {resp.status_code}: {err_msg}')
        except requests.exceptions.ConnectionError:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接失败，请检查网络')
        except requests.exceptions.Timeout:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result='连接超时，请重试')
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(llm_test_result=f'失败: {str(e)[:40]}')

    def save_asr_settings(self):
        """单独保存ASR配置"""
        try:
            funasr_input = self.root.ids.get('funasr_ip_input')
            if funasr_input:
                self.save_funasr_ip(funasr_input.text)
            groq_input = self.root.ids.get('groq_key_input')
            if groq_input:
                text = groq_input.text.strip()
                # 如果用户输入为空或仍为默认文字，使用内置密钥
                if not text or text == '已内置密钥':
                    text = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
                self.save_api_key('groq_whisper', text)
            openai_input = self.root.ids.get('openai_key_input')
            if openai_input:
                self.save_api_key('openai_whisper', openai_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass
        self._save_config()
        self.status_text = 'ASR配置已保存'

    def save_llm_settings(self):
        """单独保存LLM配置"""
        try:
            llm_input = self.root.ids.get('llm_key_input')
            if llm_input:
                self.save_llm_key(llm_input.text)
        except Exception:
            pass
        self._save_config()
        self.llm_test_result = '大模型配置已保存'

    def return_from_settings(self):
        """完成并返回首页"""
        self.root.ids.sm.current = 'home'
        self.status_text = '就绪'

    # ==================== 文件选择 ====================

    def pick_audio(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('audio')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('audio')

    def pick_doc(self):
        if platform == 'android':
            self._android_pick('doc')
        else:
            self._desktop_pick('doc')

    def _android_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from jnius import autoclass
            Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
            PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
            intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_GET_CONTENT)
            if file_type == 'audio':
                intent.setType('audio/*')
            else:
                intent.setType('application/*')
            intent.addCategory(Intent.CATEGORY_OPENABLE)
            PythonActivity.mActivity.startActivityForResult(intent, 1 if file_type == 'audio' else 2)
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'文件选择失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    def _desktop_pick(self, file_type):
        try:
            from plyer import filechooser
            if file_type == 'audio':
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择录音',
                    filters=[('音频', '*.wav', '*.mp3', '*.m4a', '*.flac')])
            else:
                paths = filechooser.open_file(title='选择文档',
                    filters=[('文档', '*.docx', '*.txt')])
            if paths:
                p = paths[0]
                if file_type == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = p
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(p)
                else:
                    self.doc_path = p
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(p)
        except Exception:
            pass

    # ==================== 微信Intent ====================

    def _check_intent(self):
        if platform != 'android':
            return
        try:
            from core.wechat_import import get_android_shared_files, classify_file, import_shared_file
            files = get_android_shared_files()
            if not files:
                return
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            data_dir = os.path.join(app_storage_path(), 'imports')
            for f in files:
                local = import_shared_file(f, data_dir)
                ftype = classify_file(local)
                if ftype == 'audio':
                    self.audio_path = local
                    self.audio_name = os.path.basename(local)
                elif ftype == 'doc':
                    self.doc_path = local
                    self.doc_name = os.path.basename(local)
            if self.audio_path or self.doc_path:
                self.status_text = '已从微信导入文件'
        except Exception as e:
            self.status_text = f'导入失败: {str(e)[:40]}'

    # ==================== 对比流程 ====================

    def start_compare(self):
        if not self.audio_path or not self.doc_path:
            self.status_text = '请先选择录音和文档'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在处理...'
        self.progress = 0
        threading.Thread(target=self._do_compare, daemon=True).start()

    def _update_ui(self, **kwargs):
        def _do(dt):
            for k, v in kwargs.items():
                setattr(self, k, v)
        Clock.schedule_once(_do)

    def _do_compare(self):
        try:
            from core.transcribe import transcribe_audio
            from core.compare import compare_texts
            from core.docx_util import parse_docx, parse_txt

            # 步骤1: 转录
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在转写录音...', progress=10)
            keys = dict(self._config.get('asr_keys', {}).get(self.asr_provider, {}))
            if self.asr_provider == 'funasr':
                keys['server_url'] = self.funasr_server
            # Groq使用内置密钥
            if self.asr_provider == 'groq_whisper' and not keys.get('key'):
                keys['key'] = self.GROQ_BUILTIN_KEY
            audio_text, timestamps = transcribe_audio(
                self.audio_path, self.asr_provider, keys,
                progress_cb=lambda m: self._update_ui(status_text=m)
            )
            self._update_ui(progress=50, status_text='转写完成')

            # 步骤2: 解析文档
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在解析文档...', progress=55)
            ext = os.path.splitext(self.doc_path)[1].lower()
            if ext == '.txt':
                paragraphs = parse_txt(self.doc_path)
            else:
                paragraphs = parse_docx(self.doc_path)
            doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)

            # 步骤3: 对比
            self._update_ui(status_text='正在对比内容...', progress=70)
            result = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text, word_timestamps=timestamps)
            self._update_ui(progress=95)

            # 保存结果供报告生成使用
            self._last_audio_text = audio_text
            self._last_doc_text = doc_text
            self._last_result = result
            self._last_report_path = ''

            # 构建结果
            diffs = result['diffs']
            items = []
            type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
            for d in diffs:
                dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
                ts = ''
                if 'time_start' in d:
                    m, s = divmod(int(d['time_start']), 60)
                    ts = f' @{m}:{s:02d}'
                if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
                    detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  ->  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
                    detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
                else:
                    detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
                items.append({'diff_type': dtype, 'diff_detail': detail})

            self._update_ui(
                progress=100,
                status_text='对比完成',
                result_summary=result['summary'],
                diff_items=items,
            )
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: setattr(self.root.ids.sm, 'current', 'result'))

        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'错误: {str(e)[:60]}', progress=0)

    # ==================== Word报告生成 ====================

    def generate_word_report(self):
        """生成Word对比报告"""
        if not self._last_result:
            self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
            return
        self.status_text = '正在生成报告...'
        threading.Thread(target=self._gen_report_thread, daemon=True).start()

    def _gen_report_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.report_gen import generate_report
            path = generate_report(
                audio_path=self.audio_path,
                doc_path=self.doc_path,
                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
                result=self._last_result,
            )
            self._last_report_path = path
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告已保存: {os.path.basename(path)}')
        except Exception as e:
            import traceback
            traceback.print_exc()
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'报告生成失败: {str(e)[:50]}')

    # ==================== 微信分享 ====================

    def share_to_wechat(self):
        """分享报告到微信"""
        if not self._last_report_path:
            # 先生成报告再分享
            if not self._last_result:
                self.status_text = '没有可用的对比结果'
                return
            self.status_text = '正在生成并分享...'
            threading.Thread(target=self._gen_and_share_thread, daemon=True).start()
        else:
            self._do_share(self._last_report_path)

    def _gen_and_share_thread(self):
        try:
            from core.report_gen import generate_report
            path = generate_report(
                audio_path=self.audio_path,
                doc_path=self.doc_path,
                audio_text=self._last_audio_text,
                doc_text=self._last_doc_text,
                result=self._last_result,
            )
            self._last_report_path = path
            Clock.schedule_once(lambda dt: self._do_share(path))
        except Exception as e:
            self._update_ui(status_text=f'生成报告失败: {str(e)[:50]}')

    def _do_share(self, file_path):
        """执行分享操作"""
        if platform == 'android':
            try:
                from jnius import autoclass
                Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
                PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
                Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
                File = autoclass('java.io.File')
                FileProvider = autoclass('androidx.core.content.FileProvider')

                activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
                file_obj = File(file_path)

                # 使用FileProvider获取content URI（Android 7.0+）
                try:
                    uri = FileProvider.getUriForFile(
                        activity,
                        activity.getPackageName() + '.fileprovider',
                        file_obj
                    )
                except Exception:
                    uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)

                intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
                intent.setType('application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document')
                intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
                intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)

                chooser = Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享核对报告')
                activity.startActivity(chooser)
                self.status_text = '已打开分享面板'
            except Exception as e:
                self.status_text = f'分享失败: {str(e)[:40]}'
        else:
            self.status_text = f'报告已保存: {file_path}'


if __name__ == '__main__':
    VoiceDocApp().run()

```python
from kivy.uix.popup import Popup
from kivy.uix.boxlayout import BoxLayout
from kivy.uix.textinput import TextInput
from kivy.uix.button import Button as KButton
from kivy.uix.label import Label as KLabel
from kivy.uix.spinner import Spinner as KSpinner

def edit_diff(self, index):
    if index < 0 or index >= len(self._raw_diffs):
        return
    diff = self._raw_diffs[index]
    
    content = BoxLayout(orientation='vertical', spacing=dp(8), padding=dp(10))
    
    # Type spinner
    type_spinner = Spinner(text=..., values=['误读', '漏读', '多读'])
    content.add_widget(type_spinner)
    
    # DocText input
    doc_input = TextInput(text=diff.get('docText', ''), hint_text='原文')
    content.add_widget(doc_input)
    
    # AudioText input
    audio_input = TextInput(text=diff.get('audioText', ''), hint_text='录音文本')
    content.add_widget(audio_input)
    
    # Time input
    time_input = TextInput(text=str(diff.get('time_start', '')), hint_text='时间(秒)')
    content.add_widget(time_input)
    
    # Save button
    def save(instance):
        diff['docText'] = doc_input.text
        diff['audioText'] = audio_input.text
        # ... update type, time
        self._save_diffs()
        self._rebuild_diff_items()
        popup.dismiss()
    
    save_btn = Button(text='保存')
    save_btn.bind(on_release=save)
    content.add_widget(save_btn)
    
    popup = Popup(title='编辑差异', content=content, size_hint=(0.9, 0.7))
    popup.open()
```

```python
def _rebuild_diff_items(self, keyword=''):
    items = []
    type_labels = {'mismatch': '误读', 'missing_in_audio': '漏读', 'extra_in_audio': '多读'}
    for i, d in enumerate(self._raw_diffs):
        dtype = type_labels.get(d['type'], d['type'])
        ts = ''
        if 'time_start' in d:
            m = int(d['time_start']) // 60
            ts = f' @第{m}分钟'
        if d['type'] == 'mismatch':
            detail = f'原文: {d["docText"]}  →  录音: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
        elif d['type'] == 'missing_in_audio':
            detail = f'漏读: {d["docText"]}{ts}'
        else:
            detail = f'多读: {d["audioText"]}{ts}'
        
        if keyword and keyword not in detail and keyword not in dtype:
            continue
        
        items.append({
            'diff_type': dtype,
            'diff_detail': detail,
            'diff_index': i,
        })
    self.diff_items = items
```

```python
def _diffs_json_path(self):
    try:
        if platform == 'android':
            from android.storage import app_storage_path
            base = app_storage_path()
        else:
            base = os.path.expanduser('~')
    except:
        base = os.path.expanduser('~')
    d = os.path.join(base, 'reports')
    os.makedirs(d, exist_ok=True)
    return os.path.join(d, 'last_diffs.json')

def _save_diffs(self):
    data = {
        'audio_path': self.audio_path,
        'doc_path': self.doc_path,
        'accuracy': self._last_result.get('accuracy', 0),
        'summary': self._last_result.get('summary', ''),
        'diffs': self._raw_diffs,
    }
    try:
        with open(self._diffs_json_path(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            json.dump(data, f, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2)
    except:
        pass

def _load_diffs(self):
    try:
        with open(self._diffs_json_path(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            data = json.load(f)
        self._raw_diffs = data.get('diffs', [])
        self._last_result = {
            'diffs': self._raw_diffs,
            'accuracy': data.get('accuracy', 0),
            'summary': data.get('summary', ''),
        }
        self.result_summary = data.get('summary', '')
        self._rebuild_diff_items()
        return True
    except:
        return False
```

结构错误（先修这些，否则后面算法优化没法落地）

  1. app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:11 资源 XML 结构已损坏，[xml] 解析报错（line 12, position
     30），会直接导致 Android 资源编译失败。
  2. app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:25、app/src/main/res/layout/
     activity_main.xml:43、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:102、app/src/main/res/
     layout/activity_main.xml:163、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:230 多处文本属性异
     常，[xml] 解析失败（line 26, position 35）。
  3. app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:99、app/src/main/res/layout/
     activity_settings.xml:204、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:222、app/src/main/
     res/layout/activity_settings.xml:296、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:324 同
     样存在 XML 结构错误，[xml] 解析失败（line 100, position 35）。

  算法实现可优化点（按收益排序）

  1. app/src/main/python/engine.py:87 当前用 SequenceMatcher 做“字级”对比，长文本复杂度和误报率
     都高。
     优化：改为“句子切分 -> 词级对齐 -> 局部字级精修”，并加最大窗口，避免全量 O(n*m) 对齐。
  2. app/src/main/python/engine.py:117 准确率公式 1 - len(diffs)*3/total 过于粗糙，且与错误类型
     无关。
     优化：按 replace/delete/insert 分别加权（类似 WER/CER），并输出可解释指标（CER、漏读率、误
     读率）。
  3. app/src/main/python/engine.py:96~100 只在整段 audio_frag/doc_frag 命中填充词时过滤，无法处
     理“片段内夹杂填充词”。
     优化：在对齐前先做 token 级停用词过滤，或对 insert 片段二次切分再过滤。
  4. app/src/main/python/engine.py:61~74 每次 replace 都做拼音转换，重复计算明显。
     优化：给 _same_pinyin 增加 LRU 缓存（key=(a,b) 或各自拼音结果缓存），长文档速度提升明显。
  5. app/src/main/python/engine.py:494~551 时间戳映射与归一化流程不一致，标点/空白会造成
     time_start/time_end 偏移。
     优化：先统一 _norm 再建立字符索引，或直接用 ASR 原生 token+time 做对齐，不走“字符偏移推
     断”。
  6. app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:542~549 分段去重仅比较前后最多 5 字，
     长重叠会残留重复。
     优化：改为最长公共后缀/前缀匹配（例如 30~50 字窗口）或按 token overlap 去重。
  7. app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:507~553 离线转写固定 30s+1s overlap，
     对不同语速不稳。
     优化：静音检测后按语音段切块（VAD），减少截断误差并提升 Sherpa 识别质量。

  额外高风险问题

  1. app/src/main/python/engine.py:124、app/src/main/python/engine.py:125、app/src/main/python/
     engine.py:230、app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:40、app/src/main/java/
     com/voicedoc/app/SettingsActivity.java:46 硬编码 API Key/Secret，存在泄漏和滥用风险。应改为
     服务端签发或至少本地安全存储+可轮换。

  如果你要，我下一步可以直接按 yolo 模式给你一版“可直接替换”的修复清单：先修 XML 编译阻塞，再落
  地前三个算法优化（对齐分层、准确率重算、拼音缓存）。

1→"""Word对比报告生成模块 - 生成带差异标注的Word文档"""
     2→import os
     3→import tempfile
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→from datetime import datetime
     6→
     7→
     8→def generate_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
     9→                     doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
    10→                     output_path: str = None) -> str:
    11→    """
    12→    生成Word格式的对比报告
    13→
    14→    Args:
    15→        audio_path: 录音文件路径
    16→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
    17→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
    18→        doc_text: 原始文档文本
    19→        result: compare_texts返回的对比结果
    20→        output_path: 输出文件路径，默认自动生成
    21→
    22→    Returns:
    23→        生成的Word文件路径
    24→    """
    25→    try:
    26→        from docx import Document
    27→        from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt, Inches
    28→        from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
    29→        from docx.oxml.ns import qn
    30→        from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # 如果没有python-docx，生成简化版txt
    33→        return _generate_text_report(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, doc_text, result, output_path)
    34→
    35→    doc = Document()
    36→
    37→    # 设置中文字体
    38→    def set_chinese_font(run, font_name='宋体', size=11):
    39→        """设置中文字体"""
    40→        run.font.name = font_name
    41→        run._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), font_name)
    42→        run.font.size = Pt(size)
    43→
    44→    # 1. 标题
    45→    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    46→    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    47→    title_run = title.add_run('配音文字核对报告')
    48→    set_chinese_font(title_run, '黑体', 18)
    49→    title_run.bold = True
    50→
    51→    # 2. 基本信息
    52→    doc.add_paragraph('\n基本信息：')
    53→    info_table = doc.add_table(rows=5, cols=2)
    54→    info_table.style = 'Light Grid Accent 1'
    55→
    56→    def set_cell_text(table, row, col, text, font_size=10):
    57→        cell = table.rows[row].cells[col]
    58→        cell.text = text
    59→        for para in cell.paragraphs:
    60→            for run in para.runs:
    61→                set_chinese_font(run, size=font_size)
    62→
    63→    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 0, '生成时间')
    64→    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 1, datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
    65→    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 0, '录音文件')
    66→    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 1, os.path.basename(audio_path))
    67→    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 0, '文档文件')
    68→    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 1, os.path.basename(doc_path))
    69→    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 0, '准确率')
    70→    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 1, f'{result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%')
    71→    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 0, '差异统计')
    72→    diff_count = result.get('n_mismatch', 0) + result.get('n_missing', 0) + result.get('n_extra', 0)
    73→    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 1, f'共{diff_count}处 (误读{result.get("n_mismatch",0)} 漏读{result.get("n_missing",0)} 多读{result.get("n_extra",0)})')
    74→
    75→    doc.add_paragraph()
    76→
    77→    # 3. 差异详情
    78→    doc.add_paragraph('差异详情：')
    79→    doc.add_paragraph('（红色=误读，蓝色=漏读，绿色=多读，括号内为时间戳）')
    80→
    81→    diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
    82→    for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
    83→        p = doc.add_paragraph(f'{i}. ', style='List Number')
    84→
    85→        diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
    86→        if diff_type == 'mismatch':
    87→            # 误读 - 红色
    88→            p.add_run(f'【误读】')
    89→            doc_text_run = p.add_run(f' 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")}')
    90→            doc_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
    91→            set_chinese_font(doc_text_run)
    92→
    93→            p.add_run(' → ')
    94→            audio_text_run = p.add_run(f'录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
    95→            audio_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
    96→            set_chinese_font(audio_text_run)
    97→
    98→        elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
    99→            # 漏读 - 蓝色
   100→            p.add_run('【漏读】')
   101→            miss_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("docText", "")}')
   102→            miss_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   103→            set_chinese_font(miss_run)
   104→
   105→        else:  # extra_in_audio
   106→            # 多读 - 绿色
   107→            p.add_run('【多读】')
   108→            extra_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
   109→            extra_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   110→            set_chinese_font(extra_run)
   111→
   112→        # 时间戳
   113→        if 'time_start' in diff:

   115→            m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
   116→            ts_run = p.add_run(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
   117→            ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(100, 100, 100)
   118→            ts_run.font.italic = True
   119→            set_chinese_font(ts_run, size=9)
   120→
   121→    # 4. 完整转写文本
   122→    doc.add_page_break()
   123→    doc.add_paragraph('完整转写文本：')
   124→    p = doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
   125→    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(audio_text))
   126→
   127→    # 5. 原始文档文本
   128→    doc.add_page_break()
   129→    doc.add_paragraph('原始文档文本：')
   130→    p = doc.add_paragraph(doc_text)
   131→    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(doc_text))
   132→
   133→    # 保存文件
   134→    if output_path is None:
   135→        # 保存到应用数据目录
   136→        try:
   137→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   138→            if kv_platform == 'android':
   139→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
   140→                base_dir = app_storage_path()
   141→            else:
   142→                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   143→        except:
   144→            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   145→
   146→        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
   147→        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   148→
   149→        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   150→        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.docx')
   151→
   152→    doc.save(output_path)
   153→    return output_path
   154→
   155→
   156→def _generate_text_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
   157→                          doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
   158→                          output_path: str = None) -> str:
   159→    """生成纯文本格式的报告（备用方案）"""
   160→    if output_path is None:
   161→        try:
   162→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   163→            if kv_platform == 'android':

   193→            diff_type = diff.get('type', '')

   197→                f.write(f'{i}. [漏读] {diff.get("docText", "")}')
   198→            else:
   199→                f.write(f'{i}. [多读] {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
   200→
   201→            if 'time_start' in diff:
   202→                ts = diff['time_start']
   203→                m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
   204→                f.write(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
   205→            f.write('\n')
   206→
   207→        f.write('\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   208→        f.write('完整转写文本：\n')
   209→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   210→        f.write(audio_text)
   211→        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   212→        f.write('原始文档文本：\n')
   213→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   214→        f.write(doc_text)
   215→
   216→    return output_path
   217→
   218→
   219→def parse_report_for_edit(report_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
   220→    """
   221→    解析已生成的报告，用于编辑功能
   222→
   223→    Returns:
   224→        {
   225→            'audio_path': str,
   226→            'doc_path': str,
   227→            'diffs': List[Dict],
   228→            'audio_text': str,
   229→            'doc_text': str,
   230→        }
   231→    """
   232→    # TODO: 实现从Word文档解析差异列表
   233→    # 目前先返回空结构
   234→    return {
   235→        'audio_path': '',
   236→        'doc_path': '',
   237→        'diffs': [],
   238→        'audio_text': '',
   239→        'doc_text': '',
   240→    }
   241→
   242→
   243→def update_diff_in_report(report_path: str, diff_index: int,
   244→                          new_diff: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
   245→    """
   246→    更新报告中的某个差异项（增删改）
   247→
   248→    Args:
   249→        report_path: 报告文件路径
   250→        diff_index: 差异项索引（-1表示新增）
   251→        new_diff: 新的差异内容
   252→
   253→    Returns:
   254→        是否成功
   255→    """
   256→    # TODO: 实现Word文档的增量更新
   257→    return False
   258→
   259→
   260→def search_diffs(report_path: str, keyword: str) -> List[int]:
   261→    """
   262→    在报告中搜索差异项
   263→
   264→    Returns:
   265→        匹配的差异项索引列表
   266→    """
   267→    # TODO: 实现搜索功能
   268→    return []
   269→
   270→
   271→def share_to_wechat(file_path: str) -> bool:
   272→    """
   273→    分享文件到微信
   274→
   275→    Args:
   276→        file_path: 要分享的文件路径
   277→
   278→    Returns:
   279→        是否成功
   280→    """
   281→    try:
   282→        from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   283→        if kv_platform != 'android':
   284→            return False
   285→
   286→        from jnius import autoclass
   287→        Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
   288→        PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
   289→        Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
   290→        File = autoclass('java.io.File')
   291→
   292→        activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
   293→        file_obj = File(file_path)
   294→        uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)
   295→
   296→        intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
   297→        intent.setType('*/*')
   298→        intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
   299→        intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)
   300→
   301→        # 尝试直接分享到微信
   302→        intent.setPackage('com.tencent.mm')
   303→
   304→        activity.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享到微信'))
   305→        return True
   306→    except Exception as e:
   307→        print(f'分享失败: {e}')
   308→        return False
   309→

content:
结构错误（先修这些，否则后面算法优化没法落地）

  1. app/src/main/AndroidManifest.xml:11 资源 XML 结构已损坏，[xml] 解析报错（line 12, position
     30），会直接导致 Android 资源编译失败。
  2. app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:25、app/src/main/res/layout/
     activity_main.xml:43、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:102、app/src/main/res/
     layout/activity_main.xml:163、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_main.xml:230 多处文本属性异
     常，[xml] 解析失败（line 26, position 35）。
  3. app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:99、app/src/main/res/layout/
     activity_settings.xml:204、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:222、app/src/main/
     res/layout/activity_settings.xml:296、app/src/main/res/layout/activity_settings.xml:324 同
     样存在 XML 结构错误，[xml] 解析失败（line 100, position 35）。

  算法实现可优化点（按收益排序）

  1. app/src/main/python/engine.py:87 当前用 SequenceMatcher 做“字级”对比，长文本复杂度和误报率
     都高。
     优化：改为“句子切分 -> 词级对齐 -> 局部字级精修”，并加最大窗口，避免全量 O(n*m) 对齐。
  2. app/src/main/python/engine.py:117 准确率公式 1 - len(diffs)*3/total 过于粗糙，且与错误类型
     无关。
     优化：按 replace/delete/insert 分别加权（类似 WER/CER），并输出可解释指标（CER、漏读率、误
     读率）。
  3. app/src/main/python/engine.py:96~100 只在整段 audio_frag/doc_frag 命中填充词时过滤，无法处
     理“片段内夹杂填充词”。
     优化：在对齐前先做 token 级停用词过滤，或对 insert 片段二次切分再过滤。
  4. app/src/main/python/engine.py:61~74 每次 replace 都做拼音转换，重复计算明显。
     优化：给 _same_pinyin 增加 LRU 缓存（key=(a,b) 或各自拼音结果缓存），长文档速度提升明显。
  5. app/src/main/python/engine.py:494~551 时间戳映射与归一化流程不一致，标点/空白会造成
     time_start/time_end 偏移。
     优化：先统一 _norm 再建立字符索引，或直接用 ASR 原生 token+time 做对齐，不走“字符偏移推
     断”。
  6. app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:542~549 分段去重仅比较前后最多 5 字，
     长重叠会残留重复。
     优化：改为最长公共后缀/前缀匹配（例如 30~50 字窗口）或按 token overlap 去重。
  7. app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:507~553 离线转写固定 30s+1s overlap，
     对不同语速不稳。
     优化：静音检测后按语音段切块（VAD），减少截断误差并提升 Sherpa 识别质量。

  额外高风险问题

  1. app/src/main/python/engine.py:124、app/src/main/python/engine.py:125、app/src/main/python/
     engine.py:230、app/src/main/java/com/voicedoc/app/MainActivity.java:40、app/src/main/java/
     com/voicedoc/app/SettingsActivity.java:46 硬编码 API Key/Secret，存在泄漏和滥用风险。应改为
     服务端签发或至少本地安全存储+可轮换。

1→"""Word对比报告生成模块 - 生成带差异标注的Word文档"""
     2→import os
     3→import tempfile
     4→from typing import List, Dict, Any
     5→from datetime import datetime
     6→
     7→
     8→def generate_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
     9→                     doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
    10→                     output_path: str = None) -> str:
    11→    """
    12→    生成Word格式的对比报告
    13→
    14→    Args:
    15→        audio_path: 录音文件路径
    16→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
    17→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
    18→        doc_text: 原始文档文本
    19→        result: compare_texts返回的对比结果
    20→        output_path: 输出文件路径，默认自动生成
    21→
    22→    Returns:
    23→        生成的Word文件路径
    24→    """
    25→    try:
    26→        from docx import Document
    27→        from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt, Inches
    28→        from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
    29→        from docx.oxml.ns import qn
    30→        from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
    31→    except ImportError:
    32→        # 如果没有python-docx，生成简化版txt
    33→        return _generate_text_report(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, doc_text, result, output_path)
    34→
    35→    doc = Document()
    36→
    37→    # 设置中文字体
    38→    def set_chinese_font(run, font_name='宋体', size=11):
    39→        """设置中文字体"""
    40→        run.font.name = font_name
    41→        run._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), font_name)
    42→        run.font.size = Pt(size)
    43→
    44→    # 1. 标题
    45→    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    46→    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    47→    title_run = title.add_run('配音文字核对报告')
    48→    set_chinese_font(title_run, '黑体', 18)
    49→    title_run.bold = True
    50→
    51→    # 2. 基本信息
    52→    doc.add_paragraph('\n基本信息：')
    53→    info_table = doc.add_table(rows=5, cols=2)
    54→    info_table.style = 'Light Grid Accent 1'
    55→
    56→    def set_cell_text(table, row, col, text, font_size=10):
    57→        cell = table.rows[row].cells[col]
    58→        cell.text = text
    59→        for para in cell.paragraphs:
    60→            for run in para.runs:
    61→                set_chinese_font(run, size=font_size)
    62→
    63→    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 0, '生成时间')
    64→    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 1, datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
    65→    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 0, '录音文件')
    66→    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 1, os.path.basename(audio_path))
    67→    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 0, '文档文件')
    68→    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 1, os.path.basename(doc_path))
    69→    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 0, '准确率')
    70→    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 1, f'{result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%')
    71→    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 0, '差异统计')
    72→    diff_count = result.get('n_mismatch', 0) + result.get('n_missing', 0) + result.get('n_extra', 0)
    73→    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 1, f'共{diff_count}处 (误读{result.get("n_mismatch",0)} 漏读{result.get("n_missing",0)} 多读{result.get("n_extra",0)})')
    74→
    75→    doc.add_paragraph()
    76→
    77→    # 3. 差异详情
    78→    doc.add_paragraph('差异详情：')
    79→    doc.add_paragraph('（红色=差异点，蓝色=录音时间戳）')
    80→
    81→    diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
    82→    for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
    83→        p = doc.add_paragraph(f'{i}. ', style='List Number')
    84→
    85→        diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
    86→        if diff_type == 'mismatch':
    87→            # 误读 - 红色
    88→            p.add_run(f'【误读】')
    89→            doc_text_run = p.add_run(f' 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")}')
    90→            doc_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
    91→            set_chinese_font(doc_text_run)
    92→
    93→            p.add_run(' → ')
    94→            audio_text_run = p.add_run(f'录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
    95→            audio_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
    96→            set_chinese_font(audio_text_run)
    97→
    98→        elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
    99→            # 漏读 - 蓝色
   100→            p.add_run('【漏读】')
   101→            miss_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("docText", "")}')
   102→            miss_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   103→            set_chinese_font(miss_run)
   104→
   105→        else:  # extra_in_audio
   106→            # 多读 - 绿色
   107→            p.add_run('【多读】')
   108→            extra_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
   109→            extra_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   110→            set_chinese_font(extra_run)
   111→
   112→        # 时间戳
   113→        if 'time_start' in diff:
   114→            ts = diff['time_start']
   115→            m = int(ts) // 60
   116→            ts_run = p.add_run(f' 第{m}分钟')
   117→            ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   118→            ts_run.font.italic = True
   119→            set_chinese_font(ts_run, size=9)
   120→
   121→    # 4. 完整转写文本
   122→    doc.add_page_break()
   123→    doc.add_paragraph('完整转写文本：')
   124→    p = doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
   125→    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(audio_text))
   126→
   127→    # 5. 原始文档文本
   128→    doc.add_page_break()
   129→    doc.add_paragraph('原始文档文本：')
   130→    p = doc.add_paragraph(doc_text)
   131→    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(doc_text))
   132→
   133→    # 保存文件
   134→    if output_path is None:
   135→        # 保存到应用数据目录
   136→        try:
   137→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   138→            if kv_platform == 'android':
   139→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
   140→                base_dir = app_storage_path()
   141→            else:
   142→                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   143→        except:
   144→            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   145→
   146→        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
   147→        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   148→
   149→        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   150→        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.docx')
   151→
   152→    doc.save(output_path)
   153→    return output_path
   154→
   155→
   156→def _generate_text_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
   157→                          doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
   158→                          output_path: str = None) -> str:
   159→    """生成纯文本格式的报告（备用方案）"""
   160→    if output_path is None:
   161→        try:
   162→            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
   163→            if kv_platform == 'android':
   164→                from android.storage import app_storage_path
   165→                base_dir = app_storage_path()
   166→            else:
   167→                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   168→        except:
   169→            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
   170→
   171→        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
   172→        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   173→
   174→        from datetime import datetime
   175→        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   176→        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.txt')
   177→
   178→    with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   179→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
   180→        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
   181→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')
   182→
   183→        f.write(f'生成时间: {datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}\n')
   184→        f.write(f'录音文件: {os.path.basename(audio_path)}\n')
   185→        f.write(f'文档文件: {os.path.basename(doc_path)}\n')
   186→        f.write(f'准确率: {result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%\n\n')
   187→
   188→        f.write('差异详情：\n')
   189→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   190→
   191→        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
   192→        for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
   193→            diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
   194→            if diff_type == 'mismatch':
   195→                f.write(f'{i}. [误读] 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")} → 录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
   196→            elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
   197→                f.write(f'{i}. [漏读] {diff.get("docText", "")}')
   198→            else:
   199→                f.write(f'{i}. [多读] {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
   200→
   201→            if 'time_start' in diff:
   202→                ts = diff['time_start']
   203→                m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
   204→                f.write(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
   205→            f.write('\n')
   206→
   207→        f.write('\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   208→        f.write('完整转写文本：\n')
   209→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   210→        f.write(audio_text)
   211→        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   212→        f.write('原始文档文本：\n')
   213→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   214→        f.write(doc_text)
   215→
   216→    return output_path
   217→
   218→

"""Word对比报告生成模块 - 生成带差异标注的Word文档"""
import os
import tempfile
from typing import List, Dict, Any
from datetime import datetime


def generate_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
                     doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
                     output_path: str = None) -> str:
    """
    生成Word格式的对比报告

    Args:
        audio_path: 录音文件路径
        doc_path: 文档文件路径
        audio_text: ASR转写文本
        doc_text: 原始文档文本
        result: compare_texts返回的对比结果
        output_path: 输出文件路径，默认自动生成

    Returns:
        生成的Word文件路径
    """
    try:
        from docx import Document
        from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt, Inches
        from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
        from docx.oxml.ns import qn
        from docx.oxml import OxmlElement
    except ImportError:
        # 如果没有python-docx，生成简化版txt
        return _generate_text_report(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, doc_text, result, output_path)

    doc = Document()

    # 设置中文字体
    def set_chinese_font(run, font_name='宋体', size=11):
        """设置中文字体"""
        run.font.name = font_name
        run._element.rPr.rFonts.set(qn('w:eastAsia'), font_name)
        run.font.size = Pt(size)

    # 1. 标题
    title = doc.add_paragraph()
    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
    title_run = title.add_run('配音文字核对报告')
    set_chinese_font(title_run, '黑体', 18)
    title_run.bold = True

    # 2. 基本信息
    doc.add_paragraph('\n基本信息：')
    info_table = doc.add_table(rows=5, cols=2)
    info_table.style = 'Light Grid Accent 1'

    def set_cell_text(table, row, col, text, font_size=10):
        cell = table.rows[row].cells[col]
        cell.text = text
        for para in cell.paragraphs:
            for run in para.runs:
                set_chinese_font(run, size=font_size)

    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 0, '生成时间')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 0, 1, datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 0, '录音文件')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 1, 1, os.path.basename(audio_path))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 0, '文档文件')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 2, 1, os.path.basename(doc_path))
    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 0, '准确率')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 3, 1, f'{result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%')
    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 0, '差异统计')
    diff_count = result.get('n_mismatch', 0) + result.get('n_missing', 0) + result.get('n_extra', 0)
    set_cell_text(info_table, 4, 1, f'共{diff_count}处 (误读{result.get("n_mismatch",0)} 漏读{result.get("n_missing",0)} 多读{result.get("n_extra",0)})')

    doc.add_paragraph()

    # 3. 差异详情
    doc.add_paragraph('差异详情：')
    doc.add_paragraph('（红色=差异点，蓝色=录音时间戳）')

    diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
    for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
        p = doc.add_paragraph(f'{i}. ', style='List Number')

        diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
        if diff_type == 'mismatch':
            # 误读 - 红色
            p.add_run(f'【误读】')
            doc_text_run = p.add_run(f' 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            doc_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(doc_text_run)

            p.add_run(' → ')
            audio_text_run = p.add_run(f'录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            audio_text_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(audio_text_run)

        elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
            # 漏读 - 蓝色
            p.add_run('【漏读】')
            miss_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            miss_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(miss_run)

        else:  # extra_in_audio
            # 多读 - 绿色
            p.add_run('【多读】')
            extra_run = p.add_run(f' {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            extra_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
            set_chinese_font(extra_run)

        # 时间戳
        if 'time_start' in diff:
            ts = diff['time_start']
            m = int(ts) // 60
            ts_run = p.add_run(f' 第{m}分钟')
            ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
            ts_run.font.italic = True
            set_chinese_font(ts_run, size=9)

    # 4. 完整转写文本
    doc.add_page_break()
    doc.add_paragraph('完整转写文本：')
    p = doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(audio_text))

    # 5. 原始文档文本
    doc.add_page_break()
    doc.add_paragraph('原始文档文本：')
    p = doc.add_paragraph(doc_text)
    set_chinese_font(p.runs[0] if p.runs else p.add_run(doc_text))

    # 保存文件
    if output_path is None:
        # 保存到应用数据目录
        try:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                base_dir = app_storage_path()
            else:
                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
        except:
            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')

        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)

        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.docx')

    doc.save(output_path)
    return output_path


def _generate_text_report(audio_path: str, doc_path: str, audio_text: str,
                          doc_text: str, result: Dict[str, Any],
                          output_path: str = None) -> str:
    """生成纯文本格式的报告（备用方案）"""
    if output_path is None:
        try:
            from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
            if kv_platform == 'android':
                from android.storage import app_storage_path
                base_dir = app_storage_path()
            else:
                base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')
        except:
            base_dir = os.path.expanduser('~')

        reports_dir = os.path.join(base_dir, 'reports')
        os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)

        from datetime import datetime
        timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
        output_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, f'核对报告_{timestamp}.txt')

    with open(output_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')

        f.write(f'生成时间: {datetime.now().strftime("%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")}\n')
        f.write(f'录音文件: {os.path.basename(audio_path)}\n')
        f.write(f'文档文件: {os.path.basename(doc_path)}\n')
        f.write(f'准确率: {result.get("accuracy", 0):.1f}%\n\n')

        f.write('差异详情：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')

        diffs = result.get('diffs', [])
        for i, diff in enumerate(diffs, 1):
            diff_type = diff.get('type', '')
            if diff_type == 'mismatch':
                f.write(f'{i}. [误读] 原文: {diff.get("docText", "")} → 录音: {diff.get("audioText", "")}')
            elif diff_type == 'missing_in_audio':
                f.write(f'{i}. [漏读] {diff.get("docText", "")}')
            else:
                f.write(f'{i}. [多读] {diff.get("audioText", "")}')

            if 'time_start' in diff:
                ts = diff['time_start']
                m, s = divmod(int(ts), 60)
                f.write(f' (时间: {m}:{s:02d})')
            f.write('\n')

        f.write('\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('完整转写文本：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
        f.write(audio_text)
        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
        f.write('原始文档文本：\n')
        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
        f.write(doc_text)

    return output_path


def parse_report_for_edit(report_path: str) -> Dict[str, Any]:
    """
    解析已生成的报告，用于编辑功能

    Returns:
        {
            'audio_path': str,
            'doc_path': str,
            'diffs': List[Dict],
            'audio_text': str,
            'doc_text': str,
        }
    """
    # TODO: 实现从Word文档解析差异列表
    # 目前先返回空结构
    return {
        'audio_path': '',
        'doc_path': '',
        'diffs': [],
        'audio_text': '',
        'doc_text': '',
    }


def update_diff_in_report(report_path: str, diff_index: int,
                          new_diff: Dict[str, Any]) -> bool:
    """
    更新报告中的某个差异项（增删改）

    Args:
        report_path: 报告文件路径
        diff_index: 差异项索引（-1表示新增）
        new_diff: 新的差异内容

    Returns:
        是否成功
    """
    # TODO: 实现Word文档的增量更新
    return False


def search_diffs(report_path: str, keyword: str) -> List[int]:
    """
    在报告中搜索差异项

    Returns:
        匹配的差异项索引列表
    """
    # TODO: 实现搜索功能
    return []


def share_to_wechat(file_path: str) -> bool:
    """
    分享文件到微信

    Args:
        file_path: 要分享的文件路径

    Returns:
        是否成功
    """
    try:
        from kivy.utils import platform as kv_platform
        if kv_platform != 'android':
            return False

        from jnius import autoclass
        Intent = autoclass('android.content.Intent')
        PythonActivity = autoclass('org.kivy.android.PythonActivity')
        Uri = autoclass('android.net.Uri')
        File = autoclass('java.io.File')

        activity = PythonActivity.mActivity
        file_obj = File(file_path)
        uri = Uri.fromFile(file_obj)

        intent = Intent(Intent.ACTION_SEND)
        intent.setType('*/*')
        intent.putExtra(Intent.EXTRA_STREAM, uri)
        intent.addFlags(Intent.FLAG_GRANT_READ_URI_PERMISSION)

        # 尝试直接分享到微信
        intent.setPackage('com.tencent.mm')

        activity.startActivity(Intent.createChooser(intent, '分享到微信'))
        return True
    except Exception as e:
        print(f'分享失败: {e}')
        return False

"""配音文字核对宝 - Android APK版 主程序"""
import os, sys, threading, json

# 设置应用数据目录
if hasattr(sys, '_MEIPASS'):
    APP_DIR = sys._MEIPASS
else:
    APP_DIR = os.path.dirname(os.path.abspath(__file__))

sys.path.insert(0, APP_DIR)

from kivy.app import App
from kivy.lang import Builder
from kivy.clock import Clock
from kivy.properties import StringProperty, NumericProperty, ListProperty, BooleanProperty
from kivy.utils import platform

from core.config import (
    ASR_PROVIDERS, LLM_PROVIDERS,
    ASR_MAP, ASR_MAP_REVERSE, LLM_MAP, LLM_MAP_REVERSE,
    ASR_NAMES, LLM_NAMES,
)

KV = '''
#:import dp kivy.metrics.dp

BoxLayout:
    orientation: 'vertical'
    canvas.before:
        Color:
            rgba: 0.96, 0.96, 0.94, 1
        Rectangle:
            pos: self.pos
            size: self.size

    # 顶部标题栏
    BoxLayout:
        size_hint_y: None
        height: dp(52)
        padding: dp(12), 0
        spacing: dp(8)
        canvas.before:
            Color:
                rgba: 0.2, 0.6, 0.86, 1
            Rectangle:
                pos: self.pos
                size: self.size

        Label:
            text: '配音文字核对宝'
            font_size: dp(19)
            bold: True
