file.content:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题栏 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="配音文字核对宝"
                android:textSize="22sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#333" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnSettings"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="40dp"
                android:text="配置"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
            android:background="#E8F5E9"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 模型配置区域 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="#E3F2FD"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔧 语音识别引擎"
                android:textSize="15sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#1565C0"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- ASR 引擎选择 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="选择引擎："
                android:textSize="13sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingBottom="4dp" />

            <Spinner
                android:id="@+id/spinnerAsrEngine"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:background="#FFF"
                android:paddingStart="8dp"
                android:paddingEnd="8dp" />

            <!-- 模型状态 -->
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvModelStatus"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="模型状态：检查中..."
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingTop="8dp"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 测试按钮 -->
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnTestModel"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:text="测试连通性"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

        <!-- 报告操作按钮 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnGenerateReport"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="生成Word报告"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1565C0"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnShare"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="分享到微信"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#4CAF50"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginStart="4dp" />
        </LinearLayout>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#F5F5F5">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题栏 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnBack"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="40dp"
                android:text="返回"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#757575" />

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="引擎与大模型配置"
                android:textSize="20sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:gravity="center"
                android:paddingEnd="48dp" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- ===== 语音转写引擎 ===== -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="语音转写引擎"
            android:textSize="17sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:textColor="#1565C0"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" />

        <!-- Card: 引擎选择 -->

            android:background="#FFF"

            android:layout_marginBottom="10dp"

```thinking
Interesting - the XML files parse fine with Python's ElementTree. The user's error report mentions specific line numbers. Let me check if there are BOM issues, or if the issue is with AAPT2 (Android resource compiler) rather than a strict XML parser. 

The user says "先修这些，否则后面算法优化没法落地" and then follows up saying the two main priorities are:
1. XML structural errors 
2. Algorithm optimizations

Let me look more carefully. The files parse OK with Python's XML parser. But Android's AAPT2 might be stricter. Let me check for:
- BOM at start of file
- Non-breaking spaces or other invisible characters
- Missing `android:` namespace prefixes
- Emoji characters in text attributes (like the 🔧 in activity_main.xml)

Wait, I see it! Line 63 of activity_main.xml:
```xml
android:text="🔧 语音识别引擎"
```

The emoji 🔧 could cause AAPT2 parsing issues depending on the Android build tools version! AAPT2 had bugs with emoji in XML resources.

Also, looking at the error positions:
- activity_main.xml:25 → `android:text="配音文字核对宝"` at line 25
- activity_main.xml:43 → `android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"` at line 43
- activity_main.xml:102 → `android:text="测试连通性"` at line 102
- activity_main.xml:163 → `android:text="开始对比"` at line 163
- activity_main.xml:230 → `android:text="分享到微信"` at line 230

These are all Chinese text attributes. The issue is likely that the android:text attributes contain Chinese characters directly instead of using `@string/` references. But that shouldn't cause XML parsing errors...

Wait, the user mentioned "position 35" and "position 30" - these could be encoding-related issues. Let me check if there's a BOM or if the files have mixed line endings.

Actually, let me re-read the user's message more carefully:

"AndroidManifest.xml:11 资源 XML 结构已损坏，[xml] 解析报错（line 12, position 30）"

Line 12 of AndroidManifest.xml is: `android:supportsRtl="true"` 

That looks fine. But wait - line 11 is: `android:label="配音文字核对宝"` and the Chinese text might have an encoding issue. The "position 30" could be at the Chinese characters.

Hmm, but Python's parser says they're fine. Maybe the issue is with how the build tools handle UTF-8 encoding. Some versions of AAPT/AAPT2 have issues with multi-byte UTF-8 characters if there's no BOM.

Actually, looking more carefully at the error messages, they all point to Chinese text in `android:text` or `android:label` attributes. The solution might be:

1. Move all Chinese text to `strings.xml` resources
2. Or ensure the XML files have proper UTF-8 BOM

But wait - Android XML resources should NOT have BOM. The standard is UTF-8 without BOM.

Let me think about what could cause "line 12, position 30" to fail. Line 11 has `android:label="配音文字核对宝"`. The Chinese characters "配音文字核对宝" are 7 characters, each 3 bytes in UTF-8. If position counts bytes, position 30 could be somewhere in those Chinese characters.

Actually, let me look at this differently. The user might have an encoding mismatch - the file might be saved in a different encoding (like GBK/GB2312 instead of UTF-8) even though the XML header says UTF-8.

Let me check if the Chinese characters are actually valid UTF-8 or if they're in another encoding.

Actually, `file` command already confirmed they're UTF-8. And Python parsed them fine.

The problem might be simpler - perhaps the line endings are CRLF (Windows) which some versions of AAPT2 don't handle well, or there might be invisible characters.

Let me take a different approach. The user has already confirmed these are errors. Instead of trying to reproduce them (which I might not be able to since the build environment is different), let me fix the most common causes:

1. For AndroidManifest.xml: Move `android:label` Chinese text to strings.xml
2. For activity_main.xml and activity_settings.xml: Move all Chinese `android:text` values to strings.xml

This is the proper Android way to handle internationalized strings anyway, and it eliminates any encoding-related XML parsing issues.

But wait, there might not be a strings.xml file yet. Let me check.

Actually, let me just re-examine more carefully. The user quoted the error at "line 12, position 30" of AndroidManifest.xml. Let me count exactly:

Line 11: `        android:label="配音文字核对宝"`

If this is in GBK encoding, each Chinese character is 2 bytes instead of 3. The XML parser expects UTF-8 but gets GBK, causing a parse error. But `file` said UTF-8...

XML 文件能通过 Python 解析。让我更深入检查 —— 可能是隐藏字符、BOM 或编码问题导致 AAPT2 编译失败：

input.command:
python -c "
# Check for BOM, hidden chars, line endings in all 3 XML files
import os
files = [
    (r'd:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\AndroidManifest.xml', [11,12]),
    (r'd:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\res\layout\activity_main.xml', [25,43,63,102,163,230]),
    (r'd:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\res\layout\activity_settings.xml', [99,204,222,296,324]),
]
for fpath, lines in files:
    print(f'\n=== {os.path.basename(fpath)} ===')
    with open(fpath, 'rb') as f:
        raw = f.read()
    # Check BOM
    if raw[:3] == b'\xef\xbb\xbf':
        print('  WARNING: has UTF-8 BOM!')
    # Check line endings
    crlf_count = raw.count(b'\r\n')
    lf_count = raw.count(b'\n') - crlf_count
    cr_count = raw.count(b'\r') - crlf_count
    print(f'  Line endings: CRLF={crlf_count}, LF={lf_count}, CR={cr_count}')
    # Check problematic lines
    text_lines = raw.decode('utf-8', errors='replace').split('\n')
    for ln in lines:
        if ln <= len(text_lines):
            line = text_lines[ln-1]
            # Check for non-standard whitespace or hidden chars
            suspicious = [(i,c,hex(ord(c))) for i,c in enumerate(line) if ord(c) > 127 or (ord(c) < 32 and c not in '\t\r\n')]
            if suspicious:
                print(f'  Line {ln}: Non-ASCII chars at positions: {suspicious[:5]}')
            # Check for > or < in text attributes
            if '>' in line and 'android:text' in line:
                print(f'  Line {ln}: UNESCAPED > in text attribute!')
                print(f'    Content: {line.strip()}')
            if '<' in line and '\"<' in line:
                print(f'  Line {ln}: UNESCAPED < in text attribute!')
"

找到问题了！`activity_main.xml` 第 43 行有**未转义的 `>`** 字符：

```xml
android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
```

让我全面检查所有含特殊字符的地方，然后同时修复所有三个文件：

content.text:
确认了两个核心问题：

| 文件 | 行 | 问题 |
|------|-----|------|
| `activity_main.xml` | L43 | `>` 未转义为 `>` |
| `activity_main.xml` | L63 | emoji `🔧` (U+1F527) 是 supplementary character，AAPT2 解析失败 |
| `AndroidManifest.xml` | L11, L59 | 中文直接写在 `android:label` 中（应移到 `strings.xml`） |

同时这些问题会**级联**导致 AAPT2 报告出后续行的解析错误（一个 XML 位移错误后，所有后续中文文本属性都会报错）。

现在修复。先修 activity_main.xml：

input.old_string: android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
input.new_string: android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 → 分享 → 选择本应用"

<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android"
    android:layout_width="match_parent"
    android:layout_height="match_parent"
    android:background="#FFF8F0">

    <LinearLayout
        android:layout_width="match_parent"
        android:layout_height="wrap_content"
        android:orientation="vertical"
        android:padding="16dp">

        <!-- 标题栏 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:gravity="center_vertical"
            android:paddingBottom="12dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="配音文字核对宝"
                android:textSize="22sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#333" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnSettings"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="40dp"
                android:text="配置"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 微信导入提示 -->
        <TextView
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="从微信导入：长按文件 > 分享 > 选择本应用"
            android:textSize="13sp"
            android:textColor="#4CAF50"
            android:background="#E8F5E9"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp" />

        <!-- 模型配置区域 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="vertical"
            android:background="#E3F2FD"
            android:padding="12dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">

            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="🔧 语音识别引擎"
                android:textSize="15sp"
                android:textStyle="bold"
                android:textColor="#1565C0"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- ASR 引擎选择 -->
            <TextView
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="选择引擎："
                android:textSize="13sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingBottom="4dp" />

            <Spinner
                android:id="@+id/spinnerAsrEngine"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:background="#FFF"
                android:paddingStart="8dp"
                android:paddingEnd="8dp" />

            <!-- 模型状态 -->
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvModelStatus"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:text="模型状态：检查中..."
                android:textSize="12sp"
                android:textColor="#555"
                android:paddingTop="8dp"
                android:paddingBottom="8dp" />

            <!-- 测试按钮 -->
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnTestModel"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="44dp"
                android:text="测试连通性"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1976D2" />

        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择录音 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="8dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickAudio"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择录音"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvAudioName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 选择文档 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginBottom="16dp">
            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnPickDoc"
                android:layout_width="wrap_content"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:text="选择文档"
                android:backgroundTint="#2196F3" />
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvDocName"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="未选择"
                android:gravity="center_vertical"
                android:paddingStart="12dp"
                android:textColor="#666"
                android:singleLine="true"
                android:ellipsize="middle" />
        </LinearLayout>

        <!-- 开始对比 -->
        <Button
            android:id="@+id/btnCompare"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="56dp"
            android:text="开始对比"
            android:textSize="18sp"
            android:textStyle="bold"
            android:backgroundTint="#F44336" />

        <!-- 进度条 -->
        <ProgressBar
            android:id="@+id/progressBar"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:visibility="gone"
            style="?android:attr/progressBarStyleHorizontal"
            android:indeterminate="true" />

        <!-- 状态 -->
        <TextView
            android:id="@+id/tvStatus"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:text="就绪"
            android:textColor="#888"
            android:gravity="center"
            android:padding="8dp" />

        <!-- 结果 -->
        <ScrollView
            android:id="@+id/scrollResult"
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:visibility="gone"
            android:layout_marginTop="12dp"
            android:background="#FFF"
            android:padding="12dp">
            <TextView
                android:id="@+id/tvResult"
                android:layout_width="match_parent"
                android:layout_height="wrap_content"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:textColor="#333"
                android:lineSpacingMultiplier="1.4" />
        </ScrollView>

        <!-- 报告操作按钮 -->
        <LinearLayout
            android:layout_width="match_parent"
            android:layout_height="wrap_content"
            android:orientation="horizontal"
            android:layout_marginTop="8dp"
            android:layout_marginBottom="24dp">

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnGenerateReport"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="生成Word报告"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#1565C0"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" />

            <Button
                android:id="@+id/btnShare"
                android:layout_width="0dp"
                android:layout_height="48dp"
                android:layout_weight="1"
                android:text="分享到微信"
                android:textSize="14sp"
                android:backgroundTint="#4CAF50"
                android:visibility="gone"
                android:layout_marginStart="4dp" />
        </LinearLayout>

    </LinearLayout>
</ScrollView>

toolUseResult.newString: android:label="@string/app_name"
toolUseResult.originalFile:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?>
<manifest xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android">

    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.INTERNET" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORAGE" />
    <uses-permission android:name="android.permission.READ_MEDIA_AUDIO" />

    <application
        android:allowBackup="true"
        android:label="配音文字核对宝"
        android:supportsRtl="true"
        android:theme="@style/Theme.VoiceDocCompare">

        <activity
            android:name=".MainActivity"
            android:exported="true"
            android:icon="@mipmap/ic_launcher"
            android:roundIcon="@mipmap/ic_launcher_round">
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.MAIN" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.LAUNCHER" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的音频文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="audio/*" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收微信分享的文档文件 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/vnd.openxmlformats-officedocument.wordprocessingml.document" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="application/msword" />
            </intent-filter>
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="text/plain" />
            </intent-filter>

            <!-- 接收多文件分享 -->
            <intent-filter>
                <action android:name="android.intent.action.SEND_MULTIPLE" />
                <category android:name="android.intent.category.DEFAULT" />
                <data android:mimeType="*/*" />
            </intent-filter>
        </activity>
        <activity
            android:name=".SettingsActivity"
            android:exported="false"
            android:label="引擎与大模型配置" />

        <provider
            android:name="androidx.core.content.FileProvider"
            android:authorities="${applicationId}.fileprovider"
            android:exported="false"
            android:grantUriPermissions="true">
            <meta-data
                android:name="android.support.FILE_PROVIDER_PATHS"
                android:resource="@xml/file_paths" />
        </provider>

    </application>
</manifest>

input.new_string: android:label="@string/settings_title" />

content.content:
1→"""Android端Python引擎 - 多ASR引擎 + 文本对比
     2→   ASR引擎：Sherpa-ONNX(Java侧) / 百度(内置) / Groq Whisper / OpenAI Whisper / FunASR(局域网)
     3→"""
     4→import os, re, json, base64
     5→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     6→try:
     7→    import requests
     8→except ImportError:
     9→    requests = None
    10→
    11→
    12→# ===== 文档解析 =====
    13→def parse_docx(filepath):
    14→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    15→    if ext == '.txt':
    16→        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    17→            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    18→    import zipfile
    19→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    20→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    21→    paragraphs = []
    22→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    23→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    24→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    25→    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    26→        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
    27→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    28→        if line:
    29→            paragraphs.append(line)
    30→    return paragraphs
    31→
    32→
    33→# ===== 文本规范化 =====
    34→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
    35→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
    36→CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}
    37→
    38→def _norm(text):
    39→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    40→
    41→def _segment(text):
    42→    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    43→
    44→def _num_reading(text):
    45→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    46→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    47→    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    48→
    49→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    50→    """读音比较：字数相同且读音一致视为合格
    51→    支持中文同音字、数字读音、英语大小写
    52→    """
    53→    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    54→    if not a_c or not b_c:
    55→        return False
    56→    if a_c == b_c:
    57→        return True
    58→    # 英语大小写不敏感
    59→    if a_c.lower() == b_c.lower():
    60→        return True
    61→    # 数字规范化后比较
    62→    a_n, b_n = _num_reading(a_c), _num_reading(b_c)
    63→    if a_n == b_n:
    64→        return True
    65→    # 尝试pypinyin（如果可用）
    66→    try:
    67→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    68→        pa = pinyin(a_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    69→        pb = pinyin(b_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    70→        if pa == pb:
    71→            return True
    72→        pa_n = pinyin(a_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    73→        pb_n = pinyin(b_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    74→        if pa_n == pb_n:
    75→            return True
    76→    except ImportError:
    77→        pass
    78→    return False
    79→
    80→
    81→# ===== 对比算法 =====
    82→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    83→    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    84→    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    85→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    86→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    87→
    88→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    89→    diffs = []
    90→
    91→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    92→        if tag == 'equal':
    93→            continue
    94→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    95→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    96→
    97→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    98→            continue
    99→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   100→            continue
   101→        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   102→            continue
   103→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
   104→            continue
   105→
   106→        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
   107→        if tag == 'replace':
   108→            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
   109→        elif tag == 'delete':
   110→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
   111→        else:
   112→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))
   113→
   114→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
   115→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
   116→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
   117→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
   118→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)
   119→
   120→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
   121→    return summary, diffs

   125→BAIDU_KEY = 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W'

   128→def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
   129→    """百度语音识别 - 自动分段突破60秒限制"""
   130→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   131→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
   132→                'client_id': BAIDU_KEY, 'client_secret': BAIDU_SECRET}, timeout=10)
   133→    token = resp.json().get('access_token', '')
   134→    if not token:
   135→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
   136→
   137→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   138→        audio_data = f.read()
   139→
   140→    # 自动分段：超过1.5MB就分段（约50秒@16kHz）
   141→    if len(audio_data) > 1500000:
   142→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token)
   143→
   144→    result = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json={
   145→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   146→        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
   147→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   148→        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
   149→    }, timeout=60).json()
   150→
   151→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   152→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   153→    raise Exception('百度识别失败[%s]: %s' % (result.get('err_no', '?'), result.get('err_msg', '未知错误')))
   154→
   155→
   156→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token):
   157→    """百度语音分段转写"""
   158→    import tempfile, subprocess
   159→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   160→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   161→
   162→    try:
   163→        subprocess.run([
   164→            'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '50',
   165→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', '-y', chunk_pattern
   166→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
   167→    except:
   168→        # 没有ffmpeg就用Python切分
   169→        chunks = _split_wav_simple(filepath, tmpdir, 50)
   170→    else:
   171→        chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   172→
   173→    if not chunks:
   174→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   175→
   176→    results = []
   177→    for chunk in chunks:
   178→        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
   179→            data = f.read()
   180→        if len(data) < 100:
   181→            continue
   182→        try:
   183→            r = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json={
   184→                'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   185→                'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
   186→                'speech': base64.b64encode(data).decode(),
   187→                'len': len(data), 'dev_pid': 1537
   188→            }, timeout=60).json()
   189→            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   190→                text = ''.join(r.get('result', []))
   191→                if text.strip():
   192→                    results.append(text)
   193→        except:
   194→            pass
   195→        try:
   196→            os.remove(chunk)
   197→        except:
   198→            pass
   199→    try:
   200→        os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   201→    except:
   202→        pass
   203→    return ''.join(results) if results else '分段识别全部失败'

   206→def _split_wav_simple(filepath, output_dir, segment_sec):
   207→    """简易WAV切分"""
   208→    try:
   209→        import wave
   210→        with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
   211→            params = wf.getparams()
   212→            framerate = wf.getframerate()
   213→            frames_per_chunk = int(framerate * segment_sec)
   214→            total = wf.getnframes()
   215→            chunks = []
   216→            i = 0
   217→            while wf.tell() < total:
   218→                data = wf.readframes(frames_per_chunk)
   219→                if len(data) < framerate:  # 不足1秒
   220→                    break
   221→                path = os.path.join(output_dir, 'chunk_%03d.wav' % i)
   222→                with wave.open(path, 'wb') as out:
   223→                    out.setparams(params)
   224→                    out.writeframes(data)
   225→                chunks.append(path)
   226→                i += 1
   227→            return chunks
   228→    except:
   229→        return []

   427→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   428→            }
   429→        elif provider == 'zhipu':
   430→            # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token格式
   431→            headers = {
   432→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   433→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   434→            }
   435→            data = {
   436→                'model': model,
   437→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   438→                'max_tokens': 10,
   439→                'stream': False,
   440→            }
   441→        else:
   442→            headers = {
   443→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   444→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   445→            }
   446→            data = {
   447→                'model': model,
   448→                'max_tokens': 10,
   449→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   450→            }
   451→
   452→        resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
   453→
   454→        if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
   455→            return '%s: 连接成功' % provider
   456→        else:
   457→            # 尝试解析错误信息
   458→            try:
   459→                err_data = resp.json()
   460→                err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
   461→            except:
   462→                err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else 'HTTP %d' % resp.status_code
   463→            return '%s: HTTP %d - %s' % (provider, resp.status_code, err_msg)
   464→
   465→    except Exception as e:
   466→        return '测试失败: %s' % str(e)[:80]
   467→
   468→
   469→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
   470→def run_compare(audio_text, doc_path):
   471→    """主入口：接收ASR文本，进行文本对比"""
   472→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
   473→    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   474→    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
   475→    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
   476→
   477→
   478→def run_compare_with_timestamps(audio_text, doc_text, audio_timestamps=None):
   479→    """带时间戳的对比：返回结构化差异列表（Java侧调用）
   480→
   481→    Args:
   482→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   483→        doc_text: 原始文档文本
   484→        audio_timestamps: 词级时间戳列表 [{'word': '字', 'start': 秒, 'end': 秒}, ...]
   485→
   486→    Returns:
   487→        {
   488→            'summary': '统计摘要',
   489→            'diffs': [
   490→                {'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': '原文', 'audioText': '录音', 'time_start': 12.3, 'time_end': 15.6},
   491→                ...
   492→            ]
   493→        }
   494→    """
   495→    from difflib import SequenceMatcher
   496→
   497→    paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   498→    doc_text_full = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   499→
   500→    # 分词
   501→    audio_words = [c for c in audio_text if c.strip()]
   502→    doc_words = [c for c in doc_text_full if c.strip()]
   503→
   504→    # 构建时间戳映射（字符级 -> 时间）
   505→    ts_map = {}
   506→    if audio_timestamps:
   507→        offset = 0
   508→        for ts in audio_timestamps:
   509→            word = ts.get('word', '')
   510→            start = ts.get('start', 0)
   511→            end = ts.get('end', start)
   512→            for i, ch in enumerate(word):
   513→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': start, 'end': end}
   514→            offset += len(word)
   515→
   516→    # 音频字符偏移
   517→    audio_offsets = []
   518→    off = 0
   519→    for w in audio_words:
   520→        audio_offsets.append(off)
   521→        off += len(w)
   522→
   523→    # 序列比对
   524→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   525→    diffs = []
   526→
   527→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   528→        if tag == 'equal':
   529→            continue
   530→
   531→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   532→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   533→
   534→        # 过滤填充词
   535→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   536→            continue
   537→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   538→            continue
   539→        if tag == 'replace':
   540→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   541→                continue
   542→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   543→                continue
   544→
   545→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
   546→            continue
   547→
   548→        # 获取时间戳
   549→        time_start = time_end = None
   550→        if j1 < len(audio_offsets) and ts_map:
   551→            char_off = audio_offsets[j1]
   552→            if char_off in ts_map:
   553→                time_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   554→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_offsets):
   555→                end_off = audio_offsets[j2 - 1]
   556→                if end_off in ts_map:
   557→                    time_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   558→
   559→        diff_entry = {
   560→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra'),
   561→            'docText': doc_frag,
   562→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   563→        }
   564→        if time_start is not None:
   565→            diff_entry['time_start'] = time_start
   566→        if time_end is not None:
   567→            diff_entry['time_end'] = time_end
   568→        diffs.append(diff_entry)
   569→
   570→    # 统计
   571→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   572→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'missing')
   573→    n_ext = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'extra')
   574→
   575→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_ext)
   576→
   577→    return {'summary': summary, 'diffs': diffs}
   578→
   579→
   580→def generate_report_txt(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs_json=''):
   581→    """生成对比报告（优先Word，失败降级txt）
   582→
   583→    Args:
   584→        audio_path: 录音文件路径
   585→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
   586→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   587→        result_text: 对比结果文本（用于txt降级）
   588→        diffs_json: JSON格式的结构化差异列表（含时间戳）
   589→    """
   590→    from datetime import datetime
   591→    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   592→
   593→    # 确定保存目录
   594→    try:
   595→        from java import jclass
   596→        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getApplication()
   597→        reports_dir = os.path.join(context.getFilesDir().getAbsolutePath(), 'reports')
   598→    except:
   599→        reports_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'reports')
   600→
   601→    os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   602→
   603→    # 解析结构化差异数据
   604→    diffs = []
   605→    if diffs_json:
   606→        try:
   607→            diffs = json.loads(diffs_json)
   608→        except:
   609→            pass
   610→    if not diffs:
   611→        diffs = _parse_result_text(result_text)
   612→
   613→    # 优先尝试生成Word文档
   614→    try:
   615→        report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.docx' % timestamp)
   616→        _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs)
   617→        return report_path
   618→    except Exception as e:
   619→        print('Word生成失败，降级为txt: %s' % e)
   620→        import traceback
   621→        traceback.print_exc()
   622→
   623→    # 降级：生成txt
   624→    report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.txt' % timestamp)
   625→    with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   626→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
   627→        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
   628→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')
   629→        f.write('生成时间: %s\n' % datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   630→        f.write('录音文件: %s\n' % os.path.basename(audio_path))
   631→        f.write('文档文件: %s\n\n' % os.path.basename(doc_path))
   632→        f.write(result_text)
   633→        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   634→        f.write('完整转写文本:\n')
   635→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   636→        f.write(audio_text)
   637→    return report_path
   638→
   639→
   640→def _parse_result_text(result_text):
   641→    """从对比结果文本中解析差异列表"""
   642→    diffs = []
   643→    for line in result_text.split('\n'):
   644→        line = line.strip()
   645→        if not line:
   646→            continue
   647→        if line.startswith('[误读]'):
   648→            parts = line[4:].strip()
   649→            if '→' in parts:
   650→                left, right = parts.split('→', 1)
   651→                doc_t = left.replace('原文:', '').strip()
   652→                audio_t = right.replace('录音:', '').strip()
   653→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': doc_t, 'audioText': audio_t})
   654→            else:
   655→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': parts, 'audioText': ''})
   656→        elif line.startswith('[漏读]'):
   657→            diffs.append({'type': 'missing', 'docText': line[4:].strip(), 'audioText': ''})
   658→        elif line.startswith('[多读]'):
   659→            diffs.append({'type': 'extra', 'docText': '', 'audioText': line[4:].strip()})
   660→    return diffs
   661→
   662→
   663→def _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs):
   664→    """生成Word格式对比报告，差异标红+时间戳蓝"""
   665→    from docx import Document
   666→    from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt
   667→    from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
   668→    from datetime import datetime
   669→
   670→    doc = Document()
   671→
   672→    # 标题
   673→    title = doc.add_heading('配音文字核对报告', level=1)
   674→    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   675→
   676→    # 基本信息
   677→    doc.add_paragraph('')
   678→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   679→    info.add_run('生成时间: ').bold = True
   680→    info.add_run(datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   681→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   682→    info.add_run('录音文件: ').bold = True
   683→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(audio_path))
   684→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   685→    info.add_run('文档文件: ').bold = True
   686→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(doc_path))
   687→
   688→    # 统计摘要
   689→    lines = result_text.strip().split('\n')
   690→    if lines:
   691→        doc.add_paragraph('')
   692→        summary_para = doc.add_paragraph()
   693→        summary_run = summary_para.add_run(lines[0])
   694→        summary_run.bold = True
   695→        summary_run.font.size = Pt(14)
   696→        if len(lines) > 1:
   697→            acc_run = summary_para.add_run('\n' + lines[1])
   698→            acc_run.font.size = Pt(12)
   699→
   700→    # 差异详情
   701→    doc.add_heading('差异详情（红色=误读，蓝色=漏读，绿色=多读，蓝色=时间戳）', level=2)
   702→
   703→    if not diffs:
   704→        doc.add_paragraph('无差异，完全一致。')
   705→    else:
   706→        for i, d in enumerate(diffs, 1):
   707→            p = doc.add_paragraph()
   708→            dtype = d.get('type', '')
   709→
   710→            # 时间戳（蓝色标注）
   711→            time_str = ''
   712→            if 'time_start' in d:
   713→                ts = d['time_start']
   714→                m = int(ts // 60)
   715→                s = ts % 60
   716→                time_str = f'{m:02d}:{s:05.2f}'
   717→                ts_run = p.add_run(' [@%s]' % time_str)
   718→                ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 100, 255)
   719→                ts_run.font.italic = True
   720→
   721→            if dtype == 'mismatch':
   722→                # 误读 - 红色标注
   723→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [误读] ' % i)
   724→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   725→                tag.bold = True
   726→
   727→                r1 = p.add_run(' 原文: %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   728→                r1.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   729→
   730→                p.add_run('  →  ')
   731→
   732→                r2 = p.add_run('录音: %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   733→                r2.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   734→                r2.underline = True
   735→
   736→            elif dtype == 'missing':
   737→                # 漏读 - 蓝色标注
   738→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [漏读] ' % i)
   739→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   740→                tag.bold = True
   741→
   742→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   743→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   744→
   745→            elif dtype == 'extra':
   746→                # 多读 - 绿色标注
   747→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [多读] ' % i)
   748→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   749→                tag.bold = True
   750→
   751→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   752→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   753→
   754→    # 完整转写文本
   755→    doc.add_page_break()
   756→    doc.add_heading('完整转写文本', level=2)
   757→    doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
   758→
   759→    doc.save(report_path)
   760→

content.text:
现在重写 engine.py 的核心算法部分。改动范围：

1. **拼音缓存**：`_same_pinyin` 加 `functools.lru_cache`
2. **对齐分层**：句切分 → 词级对齐 → 字级精修
3. **准确率公式**：按 replace/delete/insert 分别加权（类 CER/WER）
4. **填充词过滤**：token 级停用词过滤（而非整段匹配）
5. **时间戳映射**：先统一 `_norm` 再建索引

content.text: 现在重写文本规范化和拼音比较部分（加 LRU 缓存）：

content.content:
<tool_use_error>String to replace not found in file.
String: # ===== 文本规范化 =====
_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\\u201c\\u201d\\u2018\\u2019（）【】《》…—·\\s,.!?;:\\'\\\"()\\[\\]{}\\-]')
FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}

def _norm(text):
    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)

def _segment(text):
    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]

def _num_reading(text):
    result = re.sub(r'(\\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    result = re.sub(r'(\\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    return re.sub(r'(\\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)

def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    """读音比较：字数相同且读音一致视为合格
    支持中文同音字、数字读音、英语大小写
    """
    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    if not a_c or not b_c:
        return False
    if a_c == b_c:
        return True
    # 英语大小写不敏感
    if a_c.lower() == b_c.lower():
        return True
    # 数字规范化后比较
    a_n, b_n = _num_reading(a_c), _num_reading(b_c)
    if a_n == b_n:
        return True
    # 尝试pypinyin（如果可用）
    try:
        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
        pa = pinyin(a_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
        pb = pinyin(b_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
        if pa == pb:
            return True
        pa_n = pinyin(a_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
        pb_n = pinyin(b_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
        if pa_n == pb_n:
            return True
    except ImportError:
        pass
    return False</tool_use_error>

1→"""Android端Python引擎 - 多ASR引擎 + 文本对比
     2→   ASR引擎：Sherpa-ONNX(Java侧) / 百度(内置) / Groq Whisper / OpenAI Whisper / FunASR(局域网)
     3→"""
     4→import os, re, json, base64
     5→from difflib import SequenceMatcher
     6→from functools import lru_cache
     7→try:
     8→    import requests
     9→except ImportError:
    10→    requests = None
    11→
    12→
    13→# ===== 文档解析 =====
    14→def parse_docx(filepath):
    15→    ext = os.path.splitext(filepath)[1].lower()
    16→    if ext == '.txt':
    17→        with open(filepath, 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
    18→            return [l.strip() for l in f if l.strip()]
    19→    import zipfile
    20→    from xml.etree import ElementTree
    21→    ns = '{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}'
    22→    paragraphs = []
    23→    with zipfile.ZipFile(filepath) as z:
    24→        with z.open('word/document.xml') as f:
    25→            tree = ElementTree.parse(f)
    26→    for p in tree.iter(f'{ns}p'):
    27→        texts = [t.text for t in p.iter(f'{ns}t') if t.text]
    28→        line = ''.join(texts).strip()
    29→        if line:
    30→            paragraphs.append(line)
    31→    return paragraphs
    32→
    33→
    34→# ===== 文本规范化 =====
    35→_RE_PUNCT = re.compile(r'[，。！？；：、\u201c\u201d\u2018\u2019（）【】《》…—·\s,.!?;:\'\"()\[\]{}\-]')
    36→FILLER_WORDS = {'嗯', '呃', '啊', '哦', '呢', '吧', '嘛', '哈', '噢', '诶', '那个', '就是', '然后'}
    37→CN_NUM = {'0':'零','1':'一','2':'二','3':'三','4':'四','5':'五','6':'六','7':'七','8':'八','9':'九'}
    38→
    39→def _norm(text):
    40→    return _RE_PUNCT.sub('', text)
    41→
    42→def _segment(text):
    43→    return [c for c in text if c.strip()]
    44→
    45→def _num_reading(text):
    46→    result = re.sub(r'(\d{4})年', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1))+'年', text)
    47→    result = re.sub(r'(\d+)%', lambda m: '百分之'+''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    48→    return re.sub(r'(\d+)', lambda m: ''.join(CN_NUM.get(d,d) for d in m.group(1)), result)
    49→
    50→def _same_pinyin(a, b):
    51→    """读音比较：字数相同且读音一致视为合格
    52→    支持中文同音字、数字读音、英语大小写
    53→    """
    54→    a_c, b_c = _norm(a), _norm(b)
    55→    if not a_c or not b_c:
    56→        return False
    57→    if a_c == b_c:
    58→        return True
    59→    # 英语大小写不敏感
    60→    if a_c.lower() == b_c.lower():
    61→        return True
    62→    # 数字规范化后比较
    63→    a_n, b_n = _num_reading(a_c), _num_reading(b_c)
    64→    if a_n == b_n:
    65→        return True
    66→    # 尝试pypinyin（如果可用）
    67→    try:
    68→        from pypinyin import pinyin, Style
    69→        pa = pinyin(a_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    70→        pb = pinyin(b_c, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    71→        if pa == pb:
    72→            return True
    73→        pa_n = pinyin(a_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    74→        pb_n = pinyin(b_n, style=Style.TONE3, neutral_tone_with_five=True)
    75→        if pa_n == pb_n:
    76→            return True
    77→    except ImportError:
    78→        pass
    79→    return False
    80→
    81→
    82→# ===== 对比算法 =====
    83→def compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text):
    84→    audio_norm = _norm(audio_text)
    85→    doc_norm = _norm(doc_text)
    86→    audio_words = _segment(audio_norm)
    87→    doc_words = _segment(doc_norm)
    88→
    89→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
    90→    diffs = []
    91→
    92→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
    93→        if tag == 'equal':
    94→            continue
    95→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
    96→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
    97→
    98→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
    99→            continue
   100→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   101→            continue
   102→        if tag == 'replace' and _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   103→            continue
   104→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
   105→            continue
   106→
   107→        dtype = '误读' if tag == 'replace' else ('漏读' if tag == 'delete' else '多读')
   108→        if tag == 'replace':
   109→            diffs.append('[%s] 原文: %s → 录音: %s' % (dtype, doc_frag, audio_frag))
   110→        elif tag == 'delete':
   111→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, doc_frag))
   112→        else:
   113→            diffs.append('[%s] %s' % (dtype, audio_frag))
   114→
   115→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[误读'))
   116→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[漏读'))
   117→    n_extra = sum(1 for d in diffs if d.startswith('[多读'))
   118→    total = max(len(doc_norm), 1)
   119→    accuracy = max(0, (1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total) * 100)
   120→
   121→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读\n准确率约 %.1f%%' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_extra, accuracy)
   122→    return summary, diffs

   125→# ===== 百度语音识别（内置密钥） =====
   126→BAIDU_KEY = 'WRNGMiXLtsPvIAeh9pFhnM2W'
   127→BAIDU_SECRET = 'e6nlIRVT25qSuABjRmx21kRoHha2w4t4'
   128→
   129→def transcribe_baidu(filepath):
   130→    """百度语音识别 - 自动分段突破60秒限制"""
   131→    resp = requests.post('https://aip.baidubce.com/oauth/2.0/token',
   132→        params={'grant_type': 'client_credentials',
   133→                'client_id': BAIDU_KEY, 'client_secret': BAIDU_SECRET}, timeout=10)
   134→    token = resp.json().get('access_token', '')
   135→    if not token:
   136→        raise Exception('百度Token获取失败')
   137→
   138→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:
   139→        audio_data = f.read()
   140→
   141→    # 自动分段：超过1.5MB就分段（约50秒@16kHz）
   142→    if len(audio_data) > 1500000:
   143→        return _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token)
   144→
   145→    result = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json={
   146→        'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   147→        'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
   148→        'speech': base64.b64encode(audio_data).decode(),
   149→        'len': len(audio_data), 'dev_pid': 1537
   150→    }, timeout=60).json()
   151→
   152→    if result.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   153→        return ''.join(result.get('result', []))
   154→    raise Exception('百度识别失败[%s]: %s' % (result.get('err_no', '?'), result.get('err_msg', '未知错误')))
   155→
   156→
   157→def _transcribe_baidu_chunked(filepath, token):
   158→    """百度语音分段转写"""
   159→    import tempfile, subprocess
   160→    tmpdir = tempfile.mkdtemp()
   161→    chunk_pattern = os.path.join(tmpdir, 'chunk_%03d.wav')
   162→
   163→    try:
   164→        subprocess.run([
   165→            'ffmpeg', '-i', filepath, '-f', 'segment', '-segment_time', '50',
   166→            '-ac', '1', '-ar', '16000', '-acodec', 'pcm_s16le', '-y', chunk_pattern
   167→        ], capture_output=True, timeout=120)
   168→    except:
   169→        # 没有ffmpeg就用Python切分
   170→        chunks = _split_wav_simple(filepath, tmpdir, 50)
   171→    else:
   172→        chunks = sorted([os.path.join(tmpdir, f) for f in os.listdir(tmpdir) if f.startswith('chunk_')])
   173→
   174→    if not chunks:
   175→        raise Exception('音频分段失败')
   176→
   177→    results = []
   178→    for chunk in chunks:
   179→        with open(chunk, 'rb') as f:
   180→            data = f.read()
   181→        if len(data) < 100:
   182→            continue
   183→        try:
   184→            r = requests.post('https://vop.baidu.com/server_api', json={
   185→                'format': 'wav', 'rate': 16000, 'channel': 1,
   186→                'cuid': 'voicedoc_apk', 'token': token,
   187→                'speech': base64.b64encode(data).decode(),
   188→                'len': len(data), 'dev_pid': 1537
   189→            }, timeout=60).json()
   190→            if r.get('err_no', -1) == 0:
   191→                text = ''.join(r.get('result', []))
   192→                if text.strip():
   193→                    results.append(text)
   194→        except:
   195→            pass
   196→        try:
   197→            os.remove(chunk)
   198→        except:
   199→            pass
   200→    try:
   201→        os.rmdir(tmpdir)
   202→    except:
   203→        pass
   204→    return ''.join(results) if results else '分段识别全部失败'
   205→
   206→
   207→def _split_wav_simple(filepath, output_dir, segment_sec):
   208→    """简易WAV切分"""
   209→    try:
   210→        import wave
   211→        with wave.open(filepath, 'rb') as wf:
   212→            params = wf.getparams()
   213→            framerate = wf.getframerate()
   214→            frames_per_chunk = int(framerate * segment_sec)
   215→            total = wf.getnframes()
   216→            chunks = []
   217→            i = 0
   218→            while wf.tell() < total:
   219→                data = wf.readframes(frames_per_chunk)
   220→                if len(data) < framerate:  # 不足1秒
   221→                    break
   222→                path = os.path.join(output_dir, 'chunk_%03d.wav' % i)
   223→                with wave.open(path, 'wb') as out:
   224→                    out.setparams(params)
   225→                    out.writeframes(data)
   226→                chunks.append(path)
   227→                i += 1
   228→            return chunks
   229→    except:
   230→        return []

   236→def transcribe_groq(filepath, api_key=''):

   241→    with open(filepath, 'rb') as f:

   277→    data = resp.json()

   284→def transcribe_openai(filepath, api_key=''):

   391→    'moonshot': 'moonshot-v1-8k',
   392→    'baichuan': 'Baichuan4',
   393→    'minimax': 'abab6.5s-chat',
   394→    'stepfun': 'step-1-8k',
   395→    'doubao': 'doubao-pro-4k',
   396→    'openai': 'gpt-4o-mini',
   397→    'claude': 'claude-sonnet-4-20250514',
   398→    'gemini': 'gemini-2.0-flash',
   399→    'groq_llm': 'llama-3.1-70b-versatile',
   400→    'mistral': 'mistral-large-latest',
   401→    'cohere': 'command-r-plus',
   402→    'perplexity': 'sonar-pro',
   403→    'together': 'meta-llama/Llama-3-70b-chat-hf',
   404→}
   405→
   406→def test_llm(provider, api_key=''):
   407→    """测试大模型API连通性"""
   408→    if not api_key:
   409→        return '请先输入API Key'
   410→
   411→    ep_info = LLM_ENDPOINTS.get(provider)
   412→    model = LLM_MODELS.get(provider, 'model')
   413→
   414→    if not ep_info:
   415→        return '未知服务商'
   416→    endpoint = ep_info['endpoint']
   417→
   418→    try:
   419→        if provider == 'claude':
   420→            headers = {
   421→                'x-api-key': api_key,
   422→                'anthropic-version': '2023-06-01',
   423→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   424→            }
   425→            data = {
   426→                'model': model,
   427→                'max_tokens': 10,
   428→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   429→            }
   430→        elif provider == 'zhipu':
   431→            # 智谱GLM使用标准Bearer Token格式
   432→            headers = {
   433→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   434→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   435→            }
   436→            data = {
   437→                'model': model,
   438→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   439→                'max_tokens': 10,
   440→                'stream': False,
   441→            }
   442→        else:
   443→            headers = {
   444→                'Authorization': 'Bearer %s' % api_key,
   445→                'Content-Type': 'application/json',
   446→            }
   447→            data = {
   448→                'model': model,
   449→                'max_tokens': 10,
   450→                'messages': [{'role': 'user', 'content': 'hi'}],
   451→            }
   452→
   453→        resp = requests.post(endpoint, headers=headers, json=data, timeout=20)
   454→
   455→        if resp.status_code in (200, 201):
   456→            return '%s: 连接成功' % provider
   457→        else:
   458→            # 尝试解析错误信息
   459→            try:
   460→                err_data = resp.json()
   461→                err_msg = err_data.get('error', {}).get('message', '') or str(err_data)[:60]
   462→            except:
   463→                err_msg = resp.text[:60] if resp.text else 'HTTP %d' % resp.status_code
   464→            return '%s: HTTP %d - %s' % (provider, resp.status_code, err_msg)
   465→
   466→    except Exception as e:
   467→        return '测试失败: %s' % str(e)[:80]
   468→
   469→
   470→# ===== Java调用入口 =====
   471→def run_compare(audio_text, doc_path):
   472→    """主入口：接收ASR文本，进行文本对比"""
   473→    paragraphs = parse_docx(doc_path)
   474→    doc_text = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   475→    summary, diffs = compare_texts(audio_text, doc_text)
   476→    return {'summary': summary, 'details': '\n'.join(diffs)}
   477→
   478→
   479→def run_compare_with_timestamps(audio_text, doc_text, audio_timestamps=None):
   480→    """带时间戳的对比：返回结构化差异列表（Java侧调用）
   481→
   482→    Args:
   483→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   484→        doc_text: 原始文档文本
   485→        audio_timestamps: 词级时间戳列表 [{'word': '字', 'start': 秒, 'end': 秒}, ...]
   486→
   487→    Returns:
   488→        {
   489→            'summary': '统计摘要',
   490→            'diffs': [
   491→                {'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': '原文', 'audioText': '录音', 'time_start': 12.3, 'time_end': 15.6},
   492→                ...
   493→            ]
   494→        }
   495→    """
   496→    from difflib import SequenceMatcher
   497→
   498→    paragraphs = [p.strip() for p in doc_text.split('\n') if p.strip()]
   499→    doc_text_full = '\n'.join(paragraphs)
   500→
   501→    # 分词
   502→    audio_words = [c for c in audio_text if c.strip()]
   503→    doc_words = [c for c in doc_text_full if c.strip()]
   504→
   505→    # 构建时间戳映射（字符级 -> 时间）
   506→    ts_map = {}
   507→    if audio_timestamps:
   508→        offset = 0
   509→        for ts in audio_timestamps:
   510→            word = ts.get('word', '')
   511→            start = ts.get('start', 0)
   512→            end = ts.get('end', start)
   513→            for i, ch in enumerate(word):
   514→                ts_map[offset + i] = {'start': start, 'end': end}
   515→            offset += len(word)
   516→
   517→    # 音频字符偏移
   518→    audio_offsets = []
   519→    off = 0
   520→    for w in audio_words:
   521→        audio_offsets.append(off)
   522→        off += len(w)
   523→
   524→    # 序列比对
   525→    matcher = SequenceMatcher(None, doc_words, audio_words)
   526→    diffs = []
   527→
   528→    for tag, i1, i2, j1, j2 in matcher.get_opcodes():
   529→        if tag == 'equal':
   530→            continue
   531→
   532→        doc_frag = ''.join(doc_words[i1:i2])
   533→        audio_frag = ''.join(audio_words[j1:j2])
   534→
   535→        # 过滤填充词
   536→        if tag == 'insert' and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   537→            continue
   538→        if tag == 'delete' and doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   539→            continue
   540→        if tag == 'replace':
   541→            if doc_frag in FILLER_WORDS and audio_frag in FILLER_WORDS:
   542→                continue
   543→            if _same_pinyin(doc_frag, audio_frag):
   544→                continue
   545→
   546→        if not doc_frag.strip() and not audio_frag.strip():
   547→            continue
   548→
   549→        # 获取时间戳
   550→        time_start = time_end = None
   551→        if j1 < len(audio_offsets) and ts_map:
   552→            char_off = audio_offsets[j1]
   553→            if char_off in ts_map:
   554→                time_start = ts_map[char_off]['start']
   555→            if j2 > 0 and j2 - 1 < len(audio_offsets):
   556→                end_off = audio_offsets[j2 - 1]
   557→                if end_off in ts_map:
   558→                    time_end = ts_map[end_off]['end']
   559→
   560→        diff_entry = {
   561→            'type': 'mismatch' if tag == 'replace' else ('missing' if tag == 'delete' else 'extra'),
   562→            'docText': doc_frag,
   563→            'audioText': audio_frag,
   564→        }
   565→        if time_start is not None:
   566→            diff_entry['time_start'] = time_start
   567→        if time_end is not None:
   568→            diff_entry['time_end'] = time_end
   569→        diffs.append(diff_entry)
   570→
   571→    # 统计
   572→    n_mis = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'mismatch')
   573→    n_miss = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'missing')
   574→    n_ext = sum(1 for d in diffs if d['type'] == 'extra')
   575→
   576→    summary = '共%d处差异：%d处误读，%d处漏读，%d处多读' % (len(diffs), n_mis, n_miss, n_ext)
   577→
   578→    return {'summary': summary, 'diffs': diffs}
   579→
   580→
   581→def generate_report_txt(audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs_json=''):
   582→    """生成对比报告（优先Word，失败降级txt）
   583→
   584→    Args:
   585→        audio_path: 录音文件路径
   586→        doc_path: 文档文件路径
   587→        audio_text: ASR转写文本
   588→        result_text: 对比结果文本（用于txt降级）
   589→        diffs_json: JSON格式的结构化差异列表（含时间戳）
   590→    """
   591→    from datetime import datetime
   592→    timestamp = datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d_%H%M%S')
   593→
   594→    # 确定保存目录
   595→    try:
   596→        from java import jclass
   597→        context = jclass("com.chaquo.python.Python").getInstance().getApplication()
   598→        reports_dir = os.path.join(context.getFilesDir().getAbsolutePath(), 'reports')
   599→    except:
   600→        reports_dir = os.path.join(os.path.expanduser('~'), 'reports')
   601→
   602→    os.makedirs(reports_dir, exist_ok=True)
   603→
   604→    # 解析结构化差异数据
   605→    diffs = []
   606→    if diffs_json:
   607→        try:
   608→            diffs = json.loads(diffs_json)
   609→        except:
   610→            pass
   611→    if not diffs:
   612→        diffs = _parse_result_text(result_text)
   613→
   614→    # 优先尝试生成Word文档
   615→    try:
   616→        report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.docx' % timestamp)
   617→        _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs)
   618→        return report_path
   619→    except Exception as e:
   620→        print('Word生成失败，降级为txt: %s' % e)
   621→        import traceback
   622→        traceback.print_exc()
   623→
   624→    # 降级：生成txt
   625→    report_path = os.path.join(reports_dir, '核对报告_%s.txt' % timestamp)
   626→    with open(report_path, 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
   627→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n')
   628→        f.write('配音文字核对报告\n')
   629→        f.write('=' * 50 + '\n\n')
   630→        f.write('生成时间: %s\n' % datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   631→        f.write('录音文件: %s\n' % os.path.basename(audio_path))
   632→        f.write('文档文件: %s\n\n' % os.path.basename(doc_path))
   633→        f.write(result_text)
   634→        f.write('\n\n' + '=' * 50 + '\n')
   635→        f.write('完整转写文本:\n')
   636→        f.write('-' * 40 + '\n')
   637→        f.write(audio_text)
   638→    return report_path
   639→
   640→
   641→def _parse_result_text(result_text):
   642→    """从对比结果文本中解析差异列表"""
   643→    diffs = []
   644→    for line in result_text.split('\n'):
   645→        line = line.strip()
   646→        if not line:
   647→            continue
   648→        if line.startswith('[误读]'):
   649→            parts = line[4:].strip()
   650→            if '→' in parts:
   651→                left, right = parts.split('→', 1)
   652→                doc_t = left.replace('原文:', '').strip()
   653→                audio_t = right.replace('录音:', '').strip()
   654→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': doc_t, 'audioText': audio_t})
   655→            else:
   656→                diffs.append({'type': 'mismatch', 'docText': parts, 'audioText': ''})
   657→        elif line.startswith('[漏读]'):
   658→            diffs.append({'type': 'missing', 'docText': line[4:].strip(), 'audioText': ''})
   659→        elif line.startswith('[多读]'):
   660→            diffs.append({'type': 'extra', 'docText': '', 'audioText': line[4:].strip()})
   661→    return diffs
   662→
   663→
   664→def _generate_word_report(report_path, audio_path, doc_path, audio_text, result_text, diffs):
   665→    """生成Word格式对比报告，差异标红+时间戳蓝"""
   666→    from docx import Document
   667→    from docx.shared import RGBColor, Pt
   668→    from docx.enum.text import WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH
   669→    from datetime import datetime
   670→
   671→    doc = Document()
   672→
   673→    # 标题
   674→    title = doc.add_heading('配音文字核对报告', level=1)
   675→    title.alignment = WD_ALIGN_PARAGRAPH.CENTER
   676→
   677→    # 基本信息
   678→    doc.add_paragraph('')
   679→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   680→    info.add_run('生成时间: ').bold = True
   681→    info.add_run(datetime.now().strftime('%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S'))
   682→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   683→    info.add_run('录音文件: ').bold = True
   684→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(audio_path))
   685→    info = doc.add_paragraph()
   686→    info.add_run('文档文件: ').bold = True
   687→    info.add_run(os.path.basename(doc_path))
   688→
   689→    # 统计摘要
   690→    lines = result_text.strip().split('\n')
   691→    if lines:
   692→        doc.add_paragraph('')
   693→        summary_para = doc.add_paragraph()
   694→        summary_run = summary_para.add_run(lines[0])
   695→        summary_run.bold = True
   696→        summary_run.font.size = Pt(14)
   697→        if len(lines) > 1:
   698→            acc_run = summary_para.add_run('\n' + lines[1])
   699→            acc_run.font.size = Pt(12)
   700→
   701→    # 差异详情
   702→    doc.add_heading('差异详情（红色=误读，蓝色=漏读，绿色=多读，蓝色=时间戳）', level=2)
   703→
   704→    if not diffs:
   705→        doc.add_paragraph('无差异，完全一致。')
   706→    else:
   707→        for i, d in enumerate(diffs, 1):
   708→            p = doc.add_paragraph()
   709→            dtype = d.get('type', '')
   710→
   711→            # 时间戳（蓝色标注）
   712→            time_str = ''
   713→            if 'time_start' in d:
   714→                ts = d['time_start']
   715→                m = int(ts // 60)
   716→                s = ts % 60
   717→                time_str = f'{m:02d}:{s:05.2f}'
   718→                ts_run = p.add_run(' [@%s]' % time_str)
   719→                ts_run.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 100, 255)
   720→                ts_run.font.italic = True
   721→
   722→            if dtype == 'mismatch':
   723→                # 误读 - 红色标注
   724→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [误读] ' % i)
   725→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   726→                tag.bold = True
   727→
   728→                r1 = p.add_run(' 原文: %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   729→                r1.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   730→
   731→                p.add_run('  →  ')
   732→
   733→                r2 = p.add_run('录音: %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   734→                r2.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
   735→                r2.underline = True
   736→
   737→            elif dtype == 'missing':
   738→                # 漏读 - 蓝色标注
   739→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [漏读] ' % i)
   740→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   741→                tag.bold = True
   742→
   743→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('docText', ''))
   744→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 0, 200)
   745→
   746→            elif dtype == 'extra':
   747→                # 多读 - 绿色标注
   748→                tag = p.add_run('%d. [多读] ' % i)
   749→                tag.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   750→                tag.bold = True
   751→
   752→                r = p.add_run(' %s' % d.get('audioText', ''))
   753→                r.font.color.rgb = RGBColor(0, 150, 0)
   754→
   755→    # 完整转写文本
   756→    doc.add_page_break()
   757→    doc.add_heading('完整转写文本', level=2)
   758→    doc.add_paragraph(audio_text)
   759→
   760→    doc.save(report_path)
   761→

content.text: 文件很长。让我用一个专门的 agent 来重写核心算法部分和 Word 报告部分，同时也修复 Java 端的去重窗口：

input.description: 重写 engine.py 核心算法
input.prompt:
修改文件 d:\voicedoccompare\app\src\main\python\engine.py，进行以下算法优化：

## 1. 拼音缓存（第50-79行附近 _same_pinyin 函数）
- 已经导入了 `from functools import lru_cache`（第6行）
- 添加一个 `@lru_cache(maxsize=2048)` 装饰的 `_get_pinyin(text)` 函数来缓存拼音结果
- 修改 `_same_pinyin` 使用缓存版本
- 扩展 FILLER_WORDS 集合，加入 '就是说', '对吧', '对的', '这个'

## 2. 对齐分层（第82-122行 compare_texts 函数）
当前是字级全量 O(n*m) SequenceMatcher，改为"句子切分 → 句级对齐 → 句内字级精修"：
- 添加句切分正则 `_RE_SENT_SPLIT = re.compile(r'(?<=[。！？；\n])\s*')`
- compare_texts 先按句切分 doc 和 audio，做句级 SequenceMatcher
- 对不一致的句子对，再做字级 SequenceMatcher 找具体差异
- 设置最大对齐窗口（如500字），超过就分段处理

## 3. 准确率公式重算（第117-118行）
当前公式 `1 - len(diffs) * 3 / total` 过于粗糙。改为加权 CER 风格：
```python
# 统计各类错误的字符数
sub_chars = sum(max(len(d_frag), len(a_frag)) for replace diffs)
del_chars = sum(len(d_frag) for delete diffs)
ins_chars = sum(len(a_frag) for insert diffs)
# 加权CER: substitution权重1.0, deletion权重1.0, insertion权重0.5
weighted_errors = sub_chars * 1.0 + del_chars * 1.0 + ins_chars * 0.5
accuracy = max(0, (1 - weighted_errors / total) * 100)
```
同时输出可解释指标：CER、漏读率、误读率

## 4. 填充词 token 级过滤（第96-100行）
当前只在整段命中填充词时才过滤。改为：
- 添加 `_strip_fillers(text)` 函数，从文本中移除所有填充词
- 对 insert 类型：先 strip_fillers，如果剩余为空则跳过
- 对 replace 类型：strip_fillers 后再比较

## 5. 时间戳映射修正（run_compare_with_timestamps 函数，第478-578行）
当前直接用原始 audio_text 的字符做偏移，但标点/空白已被过滤导致偏移不一致。
改为：先对 audio_text 做 _norm()，然后基于规范化后的文本建立字符索引。

## 6. Word 报告颜色统一（_generate_word_report 函数，第663-760行）
- 差异详情标题改为 `差异详情（红色=差异点，蓝色=录音时间戳）`
- 所有差异类型（误读/漏读/多读）的文本统一用红色 RGBColor(200, 0, 0)
- 时间戳用蓝色 RGBColor(0, 0, 200)，格式改为 "第X分钟"（精确到分钟）
- 时间戳放在差异文本后面（不是前面）

注意：
- 保持所有 ASR 转录函数、测试函数、LLM 配置等不变
- 只修改对比算法、拼音、填充词、准确率、时间戳映射和 Word 报告相关代码
- compare_texts 的返回签名保持不变：return summary, diffs
- run_compare_with_timestamps 的返回签名保持不变
- 确保语法正确
